Wardrobe and product: Show authentic Lululemon Athletica performance apparel in every panel, rendered with extreme realism and premium fabric fidelity. Use a mix of premium activewear pieces such as: technical tanks, sports bras, lightweight performance jackets, training tops, tailored joggers, leggings, shorts, and premium sneakers. The garments must feel technical, luxurious, and movement-driven, with realistic folds, stretch tension, seam construction, matte performance surfaces, and strong product readability. Distribute the new cobalt-blue and vivid-orange palette across the styling, balanced with black, ivory, and graphite. Typography: Typography is a major visual force across the entire poster. Use oversized English editorial words and phrases integrated deeply into each panel, with letters partially behind, beside, or around the athletes. Possible text directions: “LULULEMON” “ATHLETICA” “MOVE LOUD” “FORM IN MOTION” “POWER TAKES SPACE” “STRETCH THE FRAME” Typography should be bold, modern, artistic, and premium, with strong hierarchy and dynamic placement. No crude fonts. No generic sports-ad copy. Illustration and narrative interaction: Add fine hand-drawn graphic elements in each panel, carefully matched to the movement theme. These can include: motion arcs, energy streaks, wind lines, symbolic wave forms, abstract petals, graphic sparks, curved calligraphic swirls, or subtle narrative motifs. These drawn elements must interact with the figures and text, helping each panel tell a mini story of motion, power, breath, rhythm, or control. Keep them refined and integrated, not cartoonish or decorative for decoration’s sake. Background: Each panel should have a minimal background with slight tonal variation, clean sky-like or studio-like openness, or lightly textured flat fields. Do not create cluttered environments. The emphasis must stay on the athlete, the apparel, the type, and the hand-drawn graphic storytelling. Lighting: Use bright premium editorial lighting with strong clarity on the athletes and garments. The light should sculpt muscles, posture, fabric detail, and footwear while preserving a clean graphic read. Each panel can have slightly different light mood, but all must remain within the same premium campaign system. Mood: explosive, athletic, youthful, avant-garde, editorial, premium, modern, graphic, high-energy, sharply designed, fashion-forward. Rendering style: hyper-real Lululemon Athletica 4-panel campaign poster, four different athletes, distinct action themes, minimalist backgrounds, giant editorial typography, fine hand-drawn narrative graphics, cobalt blue and vivid orange palette, premium sportswear realism, avant-garde fashion-sport magazine energy, 8k, world-class campaign quality. Negative prompt: messy collage, inconsistent panel style, cluttered backgrounds, cheap fitness ad, weak typography, distorted anatomy, broken limbs, bad hands, extra fingers, twisted joints, influencer look, generic sportswear, low-detail fabric, cartoon doodles, chaotic layout, muddy colors, low-end poster design, blurry shoes, dirty shadows, black blotches

zh.title: 健身服饰网格系列宣传海报
zh.description: 一份详细的提示词，用于创作包含运动员和醒目排版的四格运动系列宣传海报。
zh.prompt: 为 Lululemon Athletica 创作系列宣传海报中的第七张海报，设计为醒目的四格编辑风格运动海报，包含四位不同的运动员角色、四个独特的主题动作、极简背景、大型图形化排版，以及与每个人物进行叙事互动的精致手绘插画元素。图像必须具有超写实感、视觉冲击力、时尚前卫感和高级感，同时保持整洁的 2x2 网格结构。整体布局：使用垂直 4 格网格布局，分为四个相等的象限。每个板块必须展示不同的运动员、不同的运动姿势和不同的情感主题，但四者必须明确属于同一个 Lululemon 宣传系列。整张海报应呈现出一种当代时尚运动杂志封面系统与前卫品牌广告相结合的感觉。系列关键规则：所有四个板块必须共享相同的视觉 DNA：极简背景、醒目的编辑风格排版、写实的 Lululemon 服饰、强烈的人物与文字互动、精致的手绘图案、整洁的留白以及高级的宣传质感。每个板块应各具特色，但整页必须感觉连贯且经过精心艺术指导。色彩系统：将主宣传色调调整为：钴蓝色、鲜艳橙色、象牙白、石墨黑，并点缀少许淡天蓝色或柔和的暖灰色。色调应感觉清新、年轻、充满活力且现代。保持比之前版本更简洁、更具图形感，色彩系统需策略性地分布在四个板块中。避免随机添加额外颜色。板块 1：一位强壮的女性运动员，处于动态的延伸动作中，如长跨步、扭转或伸展，具有强烈的对角线构图和清晰的身体拉伸感。背景极简明亮，配有超大排版和精致的手绘运动轨迹或方向标记，与肢体和身体线条互动。板块 2：一位酷炫且具有统治力的低角度人物，可能站姿宽大或正向观众走来，具有夸张的透视感和强烈的街头时尚运动自信。大型粗体文字应环绕人物并与身体轮廓部分重叠。添加微妙的插画符号或图形标记，以强化冲击力、力量或平衡感。板块 3：捕捉能量、起跳、落地或过渡中的动作，体现节奏感。使用通透的构图、大型现代文字块以及与运动员运动路径相呼应的精致手绘线条或图形碎片。氛围应感觉振奋且极具视觉感。板块 4：一个雕塑般的英雄式姿势，采用低角度或仰角，配以强有力的手臂、躯干或腿部动作，作为最终的高潮板块。排版在此处应更具沉浸感，大字母与运动员进行更激进的互动，同时精致的插画点缀增加了力量、呼吸或动力的叙事感。运动员：使用多种健康的西方男女运动员模特，具有写实的解剖结构、雕塑般但真实的身材以及高级时尚运动气质。每个人物都必须感觉真实、现代、健美且富有表现力。拒绝网红脸。拒绝尴尬的姿势。拒绝解剖结构扭曲。手部、脚部、颈部、肩部、膝盖和比例必须保持准确自然。服装与产品：在每个板块中展示正宗的 Lululemon Athletica 专业运动服，以极致的写实感和高级面料质感呈现。使用多种高级运动服单品，例如：专业背心、运动内衣、轻量化专业夹克、训练上衣、修身慢跑裤、紧身裤、短裤和高级运动鞋。服装必须体现专业性、奢华感和运动驱动力，呈现真实的褶皱、拉伸张力、接缝结构、哑光运动质感和极强的产品辨识度。将新的钴蓝色和鲜艳橙色调分布在造型中，并与黑色、象牙白和石墨色平衡。排版：排版是整张海报的主要视觉力量。在每个板块中深度整合超大的英文编辑词汇和短语，字母部分置于运动员身后、身侧或周围。可能的文字方向：“LULULEMON”、“ATHLETICA”、“MOVE LOUD”、“FORM IN MOTION”、“POWER TAKES SPACE”、“STRETCH THE FRAME”。排版应醒目、现代、艺术且高级，具有强烈的层级感和动态布局。拒绝粗糙的字体。拒绝通用的运动广告文案。插画与叙事互动：在每个板块中添加精致的手绘图形元素，并与运动主题仔细匹配。这些元素可以包括：运动弧线、能量条纹、风线、象征性的波浪形式、抽象花瓣、图形火花、弯曲的书法漩涡或微妙的叙事图案。这些手绘元素必须与人物和文字互动，帮助每个板块讲述一个关于运动、力量、呼吸、节奏或控制的小故事。保持精致和整合，不要为了装饰而装饰。背景：每个板块应具有极简背景，带有轻微的色调变化、干净的天空感或工作室般的开阔感，或轻微纹理的平铺区域。不要制造杂乱的环境。重点必须放在运动员、服装、字体和手绘图形叙事上。灯光：使用明亮的高级编辑风格灯光，对运动员和服装具有极强的清晰度。光线应雕刻出肌肉、姿势、面料细节和鞋履，同时保持干净的图形阅读感。每个板块可以有略微不同的光影氛围，但所有板块必须保持在同一个高级宣传系统内。氛围：爆发力、运动感、年轻、前卫、编辑风格、高级、现代、图形化、高能量、设计感强、时尚前沿。渲染风格：超写实 Lululemon Athletica 四格宣传海报，四位不同的运动员，独特的动作主题，极简背景，巨型编辑排版，精致的手绘叙事图形，钴蓝色和鲜艳橙色调，高级运动服写实感，前卫时尚运动杂志能量，8k，世界级宣传品质。负面提示词：杂乱的拼贴画、不一致的板块风格、杂乱的背景、廉价的健身广告、薄弱的排版、扭曲的解剖结构、断肢、糟糕的手部、多余的手指、扭曲的关节、网红感、通用运动服、低细节面料、卡通涂鸦、混乱的布局、浑浊的颜色、低端海报设计、模糊的鞋子、脏乱的阴影、黑色斑点

en.title: Realistic Studio Fashion Portrait
en.description: A detailed prompt for creating a professional studio fashion portrait of an East Asian woman wearing a pink mini dress, featuring soft daylight and clean composition.
en.prompt:
Create a realistic vertical fashion lifestyle portrait depicting {argument name="subject" default="an East Asian adult female over 21 years old"} standing in a soft, minimalist studio or modern apartment interior. Centered from the mid-thigh to the head, she faces the camera with a warm, bright smile and a gentle, direct gaze. Her posture is slightly leaning forward, hands behind her back, shoulders relaxed, showing a friendly and confident temperament.

She has long, curly chestnut-brown hair, side-parted, naturally falling on her shoulders, fluffy and light. Her makeup is delicate and fresh: smooth, translucent skin, soft eyebrows, elegant eyeliner, long lashes, a touch of blush, and hydrated pink lip gloss. An exquisite silver necklace with a small flower pendant rests at her collarbone.

She is wearing a form-fitting {argument name="attire" default="pale pink sleeveless tight mini dress"} with thin adjustable straps and delicate metal sliders. The dress features a round neck and smooth, stretchy fabric with subtle horizontal pleats around the waist and hips. The fabric should appear soft, matte, and body-hugging while maintaining an elegant, stylish look.

The background is a bright {argument name="background" default="neutral-toned interior"} with light beige-gray walls, soft blurred shelving, minimal decor, and a clean, modern style. The lighting should be soft diffused daylight from the front, creating soft highlights on the model's face, hair, shoulders, necklace, dress fabric, and arms. Use shallow depth of field, realistic skin textures, sharp fashion aesthetics, and clean, bright colors.

Style: Realistic indoor fashion portrait, adult model, pale pink slim mini dress, flower pendant necklace, warm smile, minimalist neutral background, soft daylight, shallow depth of field, high detail, vertical aspect ratio, no text, no watermarks, no logos, no social media UI, no phone screenshots, no other people, no distorted anatomy, no cartoon style, no harsh flash, no clutter.

zh.title: 写实摄影棚时尚人像
zh.description: 一份详细的提示词，用于创作一张专业的摄影棚时尚人像，主角为身穿粉色迷你裙的东亚女性，展现柔和日光与简洁构图。
zh.prompt:
创作一张写实的竖构图时尚生活人像，描绘 {argument name="subject" default="一位 21 岁以上的东亚成年女性"} 站在柔和、极简的摄影棚或现代公寓室内。画面采用中景构图（从大腿中部到头部），她面向镜头，带着温暖明亮的微笑，目光柔和且直视前方。她身体微微前倾，双手背在身后，双肩放松，展现出友好且自信的气质。

她留着一头栗棕色的长卷发，侧分，自然地垂落在肩上，蓬松而轻盈。妆容精致清新：皮肤细腻通透，眉形柔和，眼线优雅，睫毛纤长，脸颊带有淡淡的腮红，唇部涂有水润的粉色唇彩。锁骨处戴着一条精致的银色项链，吊坠为小花造型。

她身穿一件修身的 {argument name="attire" default="淡粉色无袖紧身迷你裙"}，配有细肩带和精致的金属 Slides。裙子采用圆领设计，面料平滑且富有弹性，腰部和臀部有细微的横向褶皱。面料应呈现出柔软、哑光的质感，紧贴身形，同时保持优雅时尚的外观。

背景为明亮的 {argument name="background" default="中性色调室内"}，墙面为浅米灰色，带有柔和模糊的置物架，装饰极简，风格现代简洁。光线应为来自正面的柔和漫射日光，在模特的脸部、头发、肩膀、项链、裙子面料和手臂上形成柔和的高光。采用浅景深，呈现真实的皮肤纹理、锐利的时尚美感以及干净明亮的色彩。

风格：写实室内时尚人像，成年模特，淡粉色修身迷你裙，花朵吊坠项链，温暖微笑，极简中性背景，柔和日光，浅景深，高细节，竖构图，无文字，无水印，无 Logo，无社交媒体界面，无手机截图，无其他人，无扭曲的解剖结构，非卡通风格，无强闪光，无杂乱。

en.title: Ultra Realistic Bridal Fashion Portrait
en.description: A highly detailed cinematic prompt for generating elegant bridal portraits in European interiors with soft natural window lighting.
en.prompt: {argument name="portrait style" default="high-end hyper-realistic wedding fashion portrait"}, elegant European interior, cinematic 16:9 widescreen. The bride is positioned near the center-left, framed from mid-thigh to the top of her head. A long cathedral veil extends widely across the right half of the frame—creating a luminous, translucent visual balance with the soft glowing window on the left. Subject: young adult bride, slender and elegant figure, fair and softly glowing skin. Exquisite three-quarter profile—torso turned away toward the right of the lens, head gently looking back from the shoulder directly into the lens. Shoulders relaxed and slightly tilted, creating an elegant S-curve at the neck, waist, and hips. Head slightly tilted toward the raised shoulder. Calm, warm, understated romantic expression—a faint closed-mouth smile, soft and focused gaze. Intimate, dignified, and serene atmosphere; not exaggerated or overly commercial. Hairstyle: deep rich coffee-brown long hair, loose natural waves falling behind the shoulders and extending down the back. Silky texture, a few delicate flyaway strands illuminated by window light. Delicate, thinly separated fringe on the forehead, with longer strands framing the temples and cheeks. Sophisticated and soft, without a stiff or heavily styled appearance. The wedding veil is secured at the back crown of the head, partially covered by hair. Face and Makeup: refined and balanced features—soft arched eyebrows, almond-shaped brown eyes, slender bridge of the nose, gentle rounded cheeks, natural rose-beige lip color. Exquisite bridal makeup: glowing natural skin, pale peach blush, softly defined lashes, fine understated eyeliner, subtle taupe eye shadow, light glossy pink-nude lips, restrained highlights on cheekbones and nose bridge. Real pores, subtle tonal variations. No plastic-looking skin or excessive beautification. Gown: elegant {argument name="dress color" default="ivory white"} strapless wedding dress. Top: clean structural corset-style bodice—smooth satin or Mikado silk texture, gently sculpted sweetheart neckline, delicate internal boning, fitted to the waist. Minimalist, modern, and architectural. Below the waist: pale ivory tulle and exquisite lace in a soft A-line skirt—delicate embroidered floral and vine patterns especially over the hips and upper thighs, lace gradually blending into the fabric. Embroidery is delicate, tone-on-tone, intricate rather than heavy or shiny. Veil: long transparent cathedral ivory tulle veil, starting from the back of the head, draped diagonally across the right side of the frame, passing behind the shoulder and extending to the bottom edge. Multi-layered translucent texture—visible fine mesh, delicate folds, exquisite layered edges, soft glowing edges through the sunlight. Broad triangular shape as a major compositional element. Light and airy, not opaque or stiff. Jewelry: delicate silver or white gold bridal earrings—small floral crystal clusters with single glowing pearl drops. A narrow polished gold bracelet on the wrist of the lower arm. A delicate small gemstone ring on one finger. All jewelry is refined, small, with realistic reflections. No necklace—bare neckline and shoulders kept clean and elegant. Pose: near-side arm naturally hanging by the side—elbow slightly bent, relaxed fingers near the outer hip and upper thigh. Hands clearly visible, anatomically accurate proportions, natural knuckles, separated fingers, ring visible. Far-side arm mostly hidden behind the torso. Chest slightly lifted, waistline softly defined. Scene: {argument name="interior location" default="luxury bridal salon"}, wedding venue, or classic apartment interior. Far-left of the frame: tall floor-to-ceiling French window with cream-colored slender panes—strong diffused daylight entering, forming a bright vertical band of light at the frame's edge. Pale beige curtains hung in long folds beside the window. Background wall: traditional European wainscot molding, tall rectangular recessed panels, restrained classical decorative lines, in tones of warm ivory, champagne beige, and light taupe. Environment softly blurred. Bottom-left background: blurred cream-white flowers and low-key greenery (roses, hydrangeas, or peonies), placed low near the floor or on a small table. Top-right background: faint floral arrangements blurred into light organic shapes. Lighting: warm diffused natural window light from the left side, slightly behind the bride. Brightest illumination along the crown, facial edges, bare shoulders, and layers of the veil. Soft highlights on the satin bodice, gentle shadow shaping on the far side of the face and torso. The veil catches and scatters light forming a brilliant ivory aura without losing texture. Subtle warm reflections from the beige room soften the shadows. Tones: nearly monochromatic—ivory, cream, champagne, warm beige, light nude pink, soft taupe, pearl white, dark chocolate brown hair. Restrained saturation, warm highlights, creamy skin tones, slightly understated shadows. No pure blue-white fabrics, cold grey skin, or strong yellow/orange tones. Composition: tall window forms a glowing vertical line on the left. The bride's face near the upper-left third intersection. The veil flows into the open space on the right. Eyes are the sharpest focus, followed by eyelashes, lips, earrings, hair strands, bodice edges, and nearby veil texture. Distant wall panels, flowers, and window details dissolve into creamy bokeh. Camera and Style: high-end Korean bridal photography, luxury wedding editorial, fine art fashion photography. Full-frame 85mm or 105mm, f/1.8–f/2.5, low ISO, soft natural exposure. Gentle lens compression, extremely smooth background separation, delicate halos at bright highlights, realistic fabric rendering, fine cinematic grain. High dynamic range: sunlight hitting the veil preserves mesh detail, while shadows in the hair maintain dimensionality.

zh.title: 超写实新娘时尚人像
zh.description: 一份高细节的电影感提示词，用于在欧式室内环境下，通过柔和的自然窗光生成优雅的新娘人像。
zh.prompt: {argument name="portrait style" default="高端超写实婚纱时尚人像"}，优雅的欧式室内，电影感 16:9 宽屏。新娘位于画面中左侧，取景范围从大腿中部到头部。长款大教堂头纱在画面右半部分大面积铺开，与左侧柔和发光的窗户形成明亮、半透明的视觉平衡。主体：年轻成年新娘，身材纤细优雅，皮肤白皙且散发柔和光泽。精致的四分之三侧面——躯干背向镜头右侧，头部从肩部上方轻轻回眸直视镜头。双肩放松并略微倾斜，在颈部、腰部和臀部形成优雅的 S 型曲线。头部向抬起的一侧肩膀微倾。平静、温暖、内敛的浪漫表情——淡淡的闭唇微笑，眼神柔和且专注。氛围亲密、端庄、宁静；不夸张，也不过于商业化。发型：深咖啡棕色长发，自然松散的波浪卷发垂在肩后并延伸至背部。丝绸质感，几缕精致的碎发被窗光照亮。额前有稀疏且精致的刘海，较长的发丝修饰着太阳穴和脸颊。风格精致柔和，没有僵硬或过度造型的感觉。婚纱头纱固定在后脑勺顶部，部分被头发覆盖。面部与妆容：五官精致均衡——柔和的拱形眉毛，杏仁状棕色眼睛，鼻梁挺拔，脸颊圆润柔和，自然的玫瑰米色唇色。精致的新娘妆：透亮自然的底妆，淡桃色腮红，睫毛纤长，眼线细致内敛，低调的灰褐色眼影，轻盈有光泽的粉裸色嘴唇，颧骨和鼻梁处有克制的提亮。真实的毛孔，细微的肤色变化。没有塑料感的皮肤或过度美化。婚纱：优雅的 {argument name="dress color" default="象牙白"} 抹胸婚纱。上身：简洁的结构化紧身胸衣——光滑的缎面或米卡多丝绸质感，柔和的爱心领口，精致的内部支撑骨架，贴合腰部。极简、现代且具有建筑感。腰部以下：淡象牙色薄纱和精致蕾丝组成的柔和 A 字裙——精致的刺绣花卉和藤蔓图案，特别是在臀部和大腿上部，蕾丝逐渐融入面料中。刺绣细腻，同色系，复杂而不厚重或闪亮。头纱：长款透明大教堂象牙色薄纱头纱，从后脑勺开始，对角线覆盖画面右侧，穿过肩后并延伸至画面底部边缘。多层半透明质感——可见细密的网格、精致的褶皱、考究的层叠边缘，在阳光下呈现柔和的发光边缘。宽大的三角形作为主要的构图元素。轻盈透气，不厚重也不僵硬。珠宝：精致的银色或白金新娘耳环——小巧的花卉水晶簇，带有单颗发光的珍珠吊坠。下臂手腕上戴着一条窄窄的抛光金手镯。其中一根手指上戴着一枚精致的小宝石戒指。所有珠宝都精致、小巧，具有逼真的反射效果。不佩戴项链——裸露的颈部和肩部保持简洁优雅。姿势：近侧手臂自然垂在身侧——肘部微屈，放松的手指靠近外侧臀部和大腿上部。双手清晰可见，解剖比例准确，指关节自然，手指分开，戒指可见。远侧手臂大部分隐藏在躯干后。胸部微挺，腰线柔和。场景：{argument name="interior location" default="奢华婚纱沙龙"}、婚礼场地或经典公寓室内。画面最左侧：高大的落地法式窗户，带有奶油色细窗框——强烈的漫射日光射入，在画面边缘形成明亮的垂直光带。窗边挂着长褶的淡米色窗帘。背景墙：传统的欧式护墙板装饰，高大的矩形凹槽面板，克制的古典装饰线条，色调为温暖的象牙色、香槟米色和浅灰褐色。环境经过柔和虚化。左下角背景：模糊的奶油白色花卉和低调的绿植（玫瑰、绣球花或牡丹），放置在靠近地面的低处或小桌子上。右上角背景：模糊成浅色有机形状的淡淡花艺布置。光线：来自左侧、略在新娘后方的温暖漫射自然窗光。头顶、面部边缘、裸露的肩部和头纱层上光线最亮。缎面胸衣上有柔和的高光，面部和躯干远侧有柔和的阴影塑形。头纱捕捉并散射光线，形成灿烂的象牙色光晕，同时不失质感。来自米色房间的微弱暖色反射柔化了阴影。色调：近乎单色——象牙色、奶油色、香槟色、暖米色、浅裸粉色、柔和灰褐色、珍珠白、深巧克力棕色头发。克制的饱和度，温暖的高光，奶油般的肤色，略显内敛的阴影。没有纯蓝白色面料、冷灰色皮肤或强烈的黄/橙色调。构图：高大的窗户在左侧形成一条发光的垂直线。新娘的脸部位于左上三分之一交点附近。头纱流入右侧的留白空间。眼睛是焦点最清晰处，其次是睫毛、嘴唇、耳环、发丝、胸衣边缘和附近的头纱质感。远处的墙板、花卉和窗户细节融化成奶油般的虚化效果。相机与风格：高端韩式婚纱摄影，奢华婚礼大片，艺术时尚摄影。全画幅 85mm 或 105mm 镜头，f/1.8–f/2.5，低 ISO，柔和的自然曝光。轻微的镜头压缩感，极度平滑的背景分离，明亮高光处的精致光晕，逼真的面料渲染，细腻的电影感颗粒。高动态范围：阳光照射在头纱上保留了网格细节，同时头发中的阴影保持了立体感。

en.title: Japanese Modern Back Portrait with Shoji Lighting
en.description: A detailed photographic prompt for a woman in a wine red satin dress sitting in a traditional Japanese room with soft, cinematic lighting.
en.prompt:
Subject:
{argument name="theme" default="Back view with Japanese lighting"}

Main Subject:
A vertical photo-style portrait. In the center of the frame, a single adult woman sits on a chair with her back to the camera. Her upper body down to her thighs is featured prominently, occupying more than half of the screen. A calm moment in the center of a quiet Japanese room, enveloped in low lighting and soft brightness through a shoji screen.

Person/Expression:
A woman with a delicate and elegant atmosphere, her long black hair flowing naturally. Her face is mostly hidden, focusing on the back of her head. Her head is tilted slightly to the right at an angle that beautifully shows the line from her neck to her shoulders and spine. Although her expression is not directly visible, a quiet and lingering presence is conveyed.

Clothing/Pose:
{argument name="clothing" default="A deep wine-red satin slip dress"}. Thin straps and a low-back design that is wide open at the back. The fabric creates natural drapes and glossy wrinkles from the waist to the seat. The woman sits on a chair with her legs folded and lightly spread to the left and right, and her arms drawn gently across her chest. A posture where the line of the back, shoulder blades, and the drop of the waist look natural.

Background/Light:
{argument name="background" default="A calm Japanese-modern interior"}. Tatami floor, dark wood frames, a shoji window on the right, and a hanging scroll on the back wall. In the back left, there is a vase with thin branches and leaves and a small indirect light; on the right, a wooden desk and a small vase with a single red flower. Include a bit of a low bed or the edge of a sleeping platform in the bottom left. The primary light is soft diffused light coming from the shoji on the right, and the fill light is warm indirect lighting from the back left. The overall tone is slightly bright but maintains quiet shadows. The light on the skin gently touches the shoulders, center of the back, and upper waist, with shadows being natural and not too deep.

Composition/Camera:
2:3 vertical orientation. The camera is almost directly facing the person's back, at a height slightly lower than eye level to mid-level. The person is placed in the center, creating a stable composition with the left and right wooden frames and background elements. The focus is on the back to the waist and the drape of the dress. The background is lightly organized but left enough to feel the atmosphere of the Japanese room. Natural compression typical of a medium-telephoto lens, with a depth of field that is not too shallow to keep the person clear while the background is slightly soft.

Texture/Style:
Realistic photographic expression. The skin is smooth but avoids excessive correction to maintain a natural texture. The satin is rendered with elegant luster and deep red gradations. The textures of wood, tatami, shoji paper, and vases are also natural. The overall style is cinematic, high-quality, and tranquil Japanese-modern photography.

Negative:
Unnatural spine or shoulder shapes, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, unnatural leg angles, poor contact with props, floating sensation, unnatural gravity, overexposure, plastic-like skin, shadows inconsistent with light sources, gibberish text, logos, watermarks.

zh.title: 日式现代背影，障子门光影下的肖像
zh.description: 一份详细的摄影提示词，描绘了一位身着酒红色缎面裙的女性，坐在传统日式房间中，伴有柔和的电影感光影。
zh.prompt:
主题：
{argument name="theme" default="日式光影下的背影"}

主体：
竖构图摄影风格肖像。画面中心，一位成年女性背对镜头坐在椅子上。画面重点展示其上半身至大腿部位，占据了超过一半的屏幕。在安静的日式房间中心，沉浸在低调的照明中，柔和的光线透过障子门洒入。

人物/表情：
一位气质优雅细腻的女性，黑色长发自然垂落。面部大部分被遮挡，视觉焦点集中在后脑勺。头部向右微微倾斜，完美展现了从颈部到肩部及脊椎的线条。虽然无法直接看到表情，但传达出一种宁静而悠长的氛围。

服装/姿态：
{argument name="clothing" default="深酒红色缎面吊带裙"}。细肩带和大露背设计。面料从腰部到臀部形成自然的褶皱和光泽感。女性坐在椅子上，双腿自然向左右微微分开，双臂轻轻交叠于胸前。背部线条、肩胛骨以及腰部下垂的姿态显得十分自然。

背景/光影：
{argument name="background" default="宁静的日式现代室内"}。榻榻米地板、深色木质框架、右侧的障子窗以及后墙上的挂轴。左后方摆放着插有细枝叶的花瓶和小型间接照明；右侧有一张木桌和一个插着单朵红花的小花瓶。左下角包含一点低矮床铺或睡眠平台的边缘。主光源是来自右侧障子门的柔和漫射光，补光则是来自左后方的暖色间接照明。整体色调略显明亮，但保持了静谧的阴影。光线轻柔地落在肩部、背部中心和上腰部的皮肤上，阴影自然且不过于深沉。

构图/相机：
2:3 竖向构图。相机几乎正对人物背部，高度略低于视线至中等水平。人物置于中心，左右两侧的木质框架与背景元素营造出稳定的构图。焦点集中在背部至腰部以及裙子的褶皱上。背景布置简洁，但保留了足够的空间以营造日式房间的氛围。中长焦镜头特有的自然压缩感，景深适中，既能保持人物清晰，又能使背景略显柔和。

质感/风格：
写实摄影表现。皮肤光滑但避免过度修饰，以保持自然质感。缎面呈现出优雅的光泽和深红色的渐变。木材、榻榻米、障子纸和花瓶的质感也十分自然。整体风格为电影感、高质量且宁静的日式现代摄影。

负面提示词：
不自然的脊椎或肩部形状、多余的手指、缺失的手指、肢体融合、不自然的腿部角度、与道具接触不良、漂浮感、不自然的重力、过度曝光、塑料质感的皮肤、与光源不一致的阴影、乱码文字、标志、水印。

en.title: Neon Idol Style Sheet Generator
en.description: A comprehensive prompt for generating a structured anime character style sheet for a neon-themed idol performance, featuring multiple views, expressions, and costume details.
en.prompt:
Reference @image1 Personal portrait image
*The reference image is used for facial features, hairstyle, age perception, and atmosphere only; clothing, background, pose, and art style are not referenced.

Create a structured style sheet for a 1:1 square sharing format. The objective is to create a reference sheet for {argument name="theme" default="a 15-second anime video titled 'Solo Idol Effect Live in Neon City'"}. Using the same logic as the previous sharing style sheet, organize character, costume, expression, movement, effects, audience representation, background world-view, and color design into a single sheet. Do not re-output or replicate the layout of previous neon idol sheets. Design from scratch.

{argument name="style" default="High-quality anime style, theatrical anime grade"}. The background should be a bright off-white or light gray. Thin borders and short English labels are permitted. No long descriptions, logos, or watermarks.

Composition:
01 FRONT / MAIN IDOL
Place a large full-body front view of the main idol. Reflect the facial features and hairstyle impression from the reference image, and design a new idol costume for the neon city live performance. {argument name="costume colors" default="Black or dark navy base with pink, cyan, purple, and white luminous lines"}. Includes a translucent short jacket, dynamic skirt or stage outfit, and performance boots. Design to easily emit light particles from fingertips, sleeves, hair ends, and hems.

02 SIDE / BACK
Include smaller side and back views to show the costume structure, hair length, back design, and luminous lines.

03 FACE
Include a large facial close-up. Emphasize clarity, eye power, stage presence, and a confident expression.

04 EXPRESSIONS
3-4 expression variations. E.g., SMILE, FOCUSED, LIVE PASSION, SOFT GAZE.

05 COSTUME DETAILS
Organize and include impressive details easily identifiable in the video, such as hair accessories, translucent jacket material, luminous lines, neon decorations on the hem, boots, gloves, and waist decorations.

06 ACTION SILHOUETTES / DANCE POSES
3-5 poses during dance. E.g., emitting light particles from fingertips, creating light ribbons while spinning, a finishing pose with one arm raised, steps spreading luminous ripples at the feet, jumps with hair and costume billowing greatly. Present these as movement samples of the same person.

07 EFFECT MOTIFS
Organize and include samples of main effects. E.g., FINGERTIP SPARKLE, LIGHT RIBBON, AFTERIMAGE TRAIL, NEON FRAGMENTS, COLOR PLANE WIPE, FLOOR RIPPLE, PARTICLE BURST, GATHERING LIGHT. Colors mainly pink, cyan, purple, and white.

08 AUDIENCE EFFECT
Include expressions where effects transform into an audience. Do not over-draw normal human crowds; represent them as clusters of light particles, luminous silhouettes, light shadows raising hands, and waves of cheering particles.

09 STAGE & WORLD MOOD
Include a background sample merging the neon city and live stage. Skyscrapers, LEDs, neon signs, wet reflective floors, stage lighting, and luminous lines in the sky. A night view where the entire city looks like a live venue.

10 COLOR PALETTE
Include color samples. Primary colors: PINK, CYAN, PURPLE, WHITE. Secondary colors: BLACK, DARK NAVY, NEON BLUE.

General Policy:
- Maintain the sharing style sheet format.
- One solo idol is the protagonist.
- Effects are born from fingertips and body trajectories every time she dances.
- Those effects multiply into audience-like entities.
- Emphasize lighting, afterimages, particles, and color plane expressions unique to anime.
- Do not lean towards magical girls, wands, weapons, or large magic circles.
- Do not use the same composition or placement as existing neon idol sheets.

Prohibited Items:
- Reproduction of existing sheets.
- Single-image anchoring.
- Long descriptions, logos, watermarks.
- Real-life style, cheap TV anime style.
- Over-drawing normal human audiences.
- Compositions that look like multiple different characters exist.
- Weaponized action.

Finally, complete as a high-quality anime sharing style sheet with a new design, following the same format as the previous style sheet operation, organizing character, costume structure, expression, details, dance moves, effects, audience representation, neon city stage, and color design into one image.

zh.title: 霓虹偶像风格设定集生成器
zh.description: 一份用于生成霓虹主题偶像演出动漫角色风格设定集的综合提示词，包含多角度视图、表情及服装细节。
zh.prompt:
参考 @image1 个人肖像图
*参考图仅用于面部特征、发型、年龄感及氛围参考；服装、背景、姿势及艺术风格不作参考。

创建一个 1:1 正方形分享格式的结构化风格设定集。目标是为 {argument name="theme" default="名为《Solo Idol Effect Live in Neon City》的 15 秒动漫视频"} 创建一份参考设定集。沿用之前分享风格设定集的逻辑，将角色、服装、表情、动作、特效、观众表现、背景世界观及色彩设计整合到一张图中。请勿重复使用或复制之前霓虹偶像设定集的布局。请从零开始设计。

{argument name="style" default="高质量动漫风格，剧场版动漫级别"}。背景应为明亮的灰白色或浅灰色。允许使用细边框和简短的英文标签。禁止长篇描述、Logo 或水印。

构图：
01 正面 / 主偶像
放置一张大型全身正面视图。体现参考图中的面部特征和发型印象，并为霓虹城市现场演出设计一套全新的偶像服装。{argument name="costume colors" default="黑色或深海军蓝底色，搭配粉色、青色、紫色和白色的发光线条"}。包括半透明短外套、动态裙摆或舞台装，以及演出靴。设计上需便于从指尖、袖口、发梢和裙摆处散发出光粒子。

02 侧面 / 背面
包含较小的侧面和背面视图，以展示服装结构、头发长度、背部设计及发光线条。

03 面部
包含一张大型面部特写。强调清晰度、眼神力度、舞台表现力和自信的表情。

04 表情
3-4 种表情变化。例如：微笑、专注、现场激情、温柔注视。

05 服装细节
整理并包含视频中易于识别的精彩细节，如发饰、半透明外套材质、发光线条、裙摆上的霓虹装饰、靴子、手套和腰部装饰。

06 动作剪影 / 舞蹈姿势
3-5 个舞蹈过程中的姿势。例如：指尖散发光粒子、旋转时产生光带、单臂上举的定格姿势、脚下扩散出光之涟漪的步伐、头发和服装大幅飘动的跳跃动作。将这些呈现为同一人物的动作样本。

07 特效主题
整理并包含主要特效样本。例如：指尖闪光、光带、残影轨迹、霓虹碎片、色块擦除、地面涟漪、粒子爆发、光芒汇聚。颜色以粉色、青色、紫色和白色为主。

08 观众效果
包含特效转化为观众的表情。不要过度绘制普通人群；将其表现为光粒子簇、发光剪影、举手的发光阴影以及欢呼的粒子波浪。

09 舞台与世界观氛围
包含一张融合霓虹城市与现场舞台的背景样本。摩天大楼、LED 灯、霓虹招牌、湿润的反光地面、舞台灯光以及天空中的发光线条。呈现出整座城市如同现场演出场馆的夜景。

10 色彩盘
包含色彩样本。主色：粉色、青色、紫色、白色。辅色：黑色、深海军蓝、霓虹蓝。

通用准则：
- 保持分享风格设定集的格式。
- 以一名独唱偶像为主角。
- 特效在每次舞蹈时从指尖和身体轨迹中诞生。
- 这些特效增殖为类似观众的实体。
- 强调动漫特有的光影、残影、粒子和色块表现。
- 不要偏向魔法少女、魔杖、武器或大型魔法阵。
- 不要使用与现有霓虹偶像设定集相同的构图或布局。

禁止事项：
- 复制现有设定集。
- 单图锚定。
- 长篇描述、Logo、水印。
- 写实风格、廉价电视动画风格。
- 过度绘制普通人类观众。
- 看起来存在多个不同角色的构图。
- 武器化动作。

最后，按照之前风格设定集操作的相同格式，完成一份高质量的动漫分享风格设定集，进行全新设计，将角色、服装结构、表情、细节、舞蹈动作、特效、观众表现、霓虹城市舞台及色彩设计整合到一张图中。

en.title: Hotel Lounge Selfie Portrait
en.description: A detailed prompt for generating a photorealistic vertical portrait of a woman taking a casual selfie in a high-end hotel lounge, focusing on ivory tones and natural lighting.
en.prompt:
Theme: Afternoon in Layers of White

Subject:
A photorealistic vertical full-body portrait. In the center of a high-quality {argument name="location" default="hotel lounge"}, an {argument name="adult woman"} is sitting on an ivory round lounge chair taking a selfie with her smartphone. The person is positioned slightly left of the center, capturing her from head to toe, occupying about 70% of the frame.

Character/Expression:
A woman with natural and elegant cuteness. Clear, bright skin with light rose blush, delicate eye makeup, and a low-shine pink-beige lip. Her long dark-brown hair is softly layered with light bangs framing her forehead. Her face is turned slightly toward the upper right, looking at the smartphone screen with a modest smile.

Attire/Pose:
An {argument name="outfit" default="ivory sleeveless knit"} with openwork patterns and a high-waisted trapezoid mini skirt with a thin beige belt. Ivory open-toe heels with thin ankle straps on her feet. She sits in the center of the chair with her back naturally straight, stretching her right arm diagonally upward to hold the white smartphone. Her left hand lightly touches the ends of her hair near her chest. Knees are close together, legs extended diagonally forward and naturally crossed at the shins. Soft wrinkles follow her seated posture in the clothing.

Background/Lighting:
A luxurious lounge featuring a beige natural stone floor, warm wood, and thin gold railings. To the right, a round side table holds a white ceramic vase, thin branches, a small ivory box, and a pouch. In the left background, a blurred console and stone wall. Soft daylight enters from the front right, brightly illuminating her face, right arm, and the front of her legs. A thin shadow falls under the chair and to her left, with subtle reflections spreading across the floor.

Composition/Camera:
Vertical, medium-long shot including the full body. The camera captures her almost from the front at a height slightly lower than her chest. A stable triangular composition is formed by the person, chair, and side table, leaving a small margin at the top and enough floor space at her feet. Natural perspective equivalent to a standard lens. Focus on her eyes and face while lightly blurring the background to preserve the spatial texture.

Texture/Style:
A realistic photograph resembling a lifestyle advertisement for a luxury hotel. A calm color palette centered on ivory, cream, and pale gold. Precise representation of natural skin texture, delicate hair, knit stitches, stone floor patterns, and chair fabric. Avoid excessive skin smoothing, finishing with soft contrast and a clean brightness.

Negative:
Unnatural face, asymmetrical eyes, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, bent smartphone, poor contact between hand and device, fused arms or legs, broken joints, floating shoes, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with light source, excessive skin correction, plastic-like skin, logos, watermarks.

zh.title: 酒店休息室自拍肖像
zh.description: 一份详细的提示词，用于生成一张写实风格的竖版肖像，描绘一位女性在高端酒店休息室拍摄休闲自拍，重点呈现象牙色调与自然光感。
zh.prompt:
主题：白色层次中的午后时光

主体：
一张写实风格的竖版全身肖像。在高质量的 {argument name="location" default="酒店休息室"} 中心，一位 {argument name="成年女性"} 正坐在象牙色的圆形休闲椅上，用智能手机自拍。人物位于画面中心偏左位置，从头到脚入镜，占据约 70% 的画幅。

人物/表情：
一位自然且优雅可爱的女性。皮肤通透亮白，带有淡淡的玫瑰色腮红，眼妆精致，唇色为低光泽的粉米色。深棕色长发层次分明，轻盈的刘海修饰着额头。脸部略微转向右上方，注视着手机屏幕，带着含蓄的微笑。

着装/姿势：
身穿 {argument name="outfit" default="象牙色无袖针织衫"}，带有镂空花纹，搭配高腰梯形迷你裙和一条细米色腰带。脚穿带有细脚踝绑带的象牙色露趾高跟鞋。她坐在椅子中央，背部自然挺直，右臂向右上方斜伸，手持白色智能手机。左手轻触胸前的发梢。双膝并拢，双腿斜向前方伸展，小腿自然交叉。衣物随着坐姿产生自然的褶皱。

背景/光影：
奢华的休息室，铺设米色天然石材地板，装饰着暖色调木材和细金栏杆。右侧的圆形边桌上摆放着白色陶瓷花瓶、细枝、一个小象牙色盒子和一个小袋子。左侧背景为虚化的控制台和石墙。柔和的日光从右前方射入，明亮地照亮了她的脸部、右臂和双腿前方。椅子下方及左侧投下淡淡的阴影，地板上散布着微妙的反射光。

构图/摄影：
竖版，包含全身的中远景镜头。相机几乎从正面拍摄，高度略低于胸部。由人物、椅子和边桌构成稳定的三角形构图，顶部留有少量空间，脚下留有充足的地板空间。采用相当于标准镜头的自然透视。对焦于眼睛和面部，同时轻微虚化背景以保留空间质感。

质感/风格：
一张类似于豪华酒店生活方式广告的写实照片。以象牙色、奶油色和淡金色为主的冷静色调。精准呈现自然的皮肤纹理、细腻的发丝、针织针脚、石材地板纹理和椅面织物。避免过度磨皮，呈现柔和的对比度和清爽的亮度。

负面提示词：
面部不自然、眼睛不对称、眼神不自然、多指、缺指、手机弯曲、手与设备接触不良、手臂或腿部融合、关节断裂、鞋子悬空、透视错误、阴影与光源不一致、过度皮肤修正、塑料感皮肤、标志、水印。

en.title: Japanese Summer Portrait Under Leaf Shadows
en.description: A highly descriptive prompt for generating a summer-themed portrait in a Japanese residential setting, focusing on soft sunlight, leaf shadows, and a natural, film-like aesthetic.
en.prompt:
Subject:
In the Middle of Leaf Shadows

Main Subject:
A {argument name="subject" default="single woman"} in a {argument name="setting" default="quiet tree-lined path near a summer residential area"} reaching out gently toward the leaf tips above. The subject is positioned slightly left of the center, in a vertical composition showing from the upper body to mid-thigh. The subject occupies about 65% of the frame, with wide margins and green bokeh in the background.

Person/Expression:
A woman with a natural adult atmosphere. Soft oval facial contour, small bridge of the nose, transparent skin, and calm, large eyes. Her gaze is directed toward the leaves at the top right, with a modest smile on her lips. Hair is tied in a loose low bun with fine stray hairs falling on the cheeks and neck. Natural brown-toned makeup, light coral pink lips, and small catchlights in the eyes.

Clothing/Pose:
{argument name="clothing" default="White ribbed camisole top"} with a thin, sheer white summer shirt draped over the shoulders. Bottoms are light beige linen shorts. Right arm raised touching the branch tips, left hand resting naturally near the waist. A rattan woven bag hangs from the shoulder. Overall light and cool summer holiday coordination.

Background/Light:
Narrow tree-lined path in a Japanese residential area. Low concrete walls, distant houses, soft green plantings. Midsummer morning sunlight filters through the trees, casting shadows on the ground, shoulders, and arms. Light enters from the top left, creating warm highlights on cheeks, collarbones, and arms. The background is heavily blurred with refreshing green and white tones.

Composition/Camera:
Vertical portrait composition, 85mm equivalent, medium telephoto lens expression. Camera position at chest height, slightly low angle. Shallow depth of field with large background blur, focusing accurately on the subject's eyes and face. Diagonal composition formed by the leaves on the top right and the bag on the bottom left.

Texture/Style:
High-quality photographic expression. Natural skin texture, soft contrast, and the transparency unique to summer sunlight. Calm gradations and atmosphere like film photography. Realistic depiction avoiding excessive sharpness or HDR processing.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, floating, unnatural gravity, incorrect perspective, garbled text, logos, watermarks, excessive skin smoothing, plastic-looking skin.

zh.title: 日式夏日树影肖像
zh.description: 这是一个高度描述性的提示词，用于在日式住宅背景下生成夏日主题肖像，重点呈现柔和阳光、树影斑驳以及自然胶片质感的审美。
zh.prompt:
主体：
树影之间

主要主体：
一位 {argument name="subject" default="年轻女性"} 在 {argument name="setting" default="夏日住宅区附近的静谧林荫小道"} 上，轻轻向头顶的叶尖伸出手。主体位于画面中心偏左，采用竖构图，展示上半身至大腿中部的范围。主体占据画面约 65%，留白充足，背景呈现绿色虚化效果。

人物/表情：
一位散发着自然成熟气息的女性。面部轮廓呈柔和的椭圆形，鼻梁小巧，皮肤通透，双眸沉静而明亮。目光投向右上方的叶片，嘴角带着含蓄的微笑。头发松散地扎成低发髻，几缕碎发垂落在脸颊和颈部。自然棕色系妆容，浅珊瑚粉色唇妆，眼中带有细小的眼神光。

服装/姿势：
{argument name="clothing" default="白色罗纹吊带背心"}，肩上披着一件轻薄的白色夏季衬衫。下身穿着浅米色亚麻短裤。右手抬起触碰枝尖，左手自然地垂在腰间。肩上挎着一个藤编包。整体呈现出轻盈清爽的夏日度假穿搭。

背景/光影：
日式住宅区狭窄的林荫小道。低矮的混凝土墙，远处的房屋，葱郁的植被。盛夏的晨光透过树叶洒下，在地面、肩膀和手臂上投下斑驳的阴影。光线从左上方射入，在脸颊、锁骨和手臂上形成温暖的高光。背景经过深度虚化，呈现出清爽的绿白色调。

构图/相机：
竖向肖像构图，85mm 等效焦距，中长焦镜头表现。相机位置位于胸部高度，略微仰拍。浅景深，背景虚化强烈，焦点精准对准主体的眼睛和面部。右上方的叶片与左下方的包形成对角线构图。

质感/风格：
高质量摄影表现。自然的皮肤质感，柔和的对比度，以及夏日阳光特有的通透感。色彩过渡平缓，具有胶片摄影般的氛围。写实风格，避免过度的锐化或 HDR 处理。

负面提示词：
面部不自然、眼神不自然、多余的手指、手指缺失、肢体融合、关节断裂、漂浮、重力不自然、透视错误、乱码文字、Logo、水印、皮肤过度磨皮、塑料感皮肤。

en.title: Surreal Liquid Metal Football Portrait
en.description: A high-contrast surreal portrait of a football player featuring a monochrome style and a glossy liquid-metal distortion across the eyes.
en.prompt: Ultra-minimalist surreal football portrait of a professional player against a solid {argument name="background color" default="deep burgundy"} background, centered composition, wearing an {argument name="apparel" default="authentic national team jersey"}, direct eye contact, neutral expression. A glossy liquid-metal ribbon slices horizontally through the face at eye level, stretching far beyond the head with smooth fluid motion, creating a warped distortion effect that reveals the eyes in full natural color while the rest of the portrait remains monochrome black and white. Hyper-realistic skin texture, dramatic studio lighting, high contrast, cinematic shadows, symmetrical framing, editorial fashion photography, abstract optical illusion, clean negative space, ultra-sharp focus, premium magazine cover aesthetic, photorealistic, {argument name="lens" default="85mm"} lens, f/2, HDR, 8K, no text, no watermark.

zh.title: 超现实液态金属足球肖像
zh.description: 一张高对比度的超现实足球运动员肖像，采用单色风格，眼睛处呈现出光泽的液态金属扭曲效果。
zh.prompt: 极简主义超现实足球肖像，专业球员置于纯色 {argument name="background color" default="深酒红色"} 背景中，居中构图，身穿 {argument name="apparel" default="正版国家队球衣"}，直视镜头，表情中性。一条光泽的液态金属丝带在眼睛高度水平切过面部，以平滑的流体运动向头部两侧延伸，产生扭曲效果，显露出全彩色的双眼，而肖像其余部分保持黑白单色。超逼真的皮肤纹理，戏剧性的摄影棚灯光，高对比度，电影级阴影，对称构图，时尚杂志摄影风格，抽象视觉错觉，干净的留白，超清晰对焦，高级杂志封面美学，照片级真实感，{argument name="lens" default="85mm"} 镜头，f/2，HDR，8K，无文字，无水印。

en.title: Korean Streetwear Magazine Cover Design
en.description: A highly detailed prompt for a streetwear magazine cover, featuring specific clothing, styling, and studio lighting elements for a professional editorial look.
en.prompt:
Ultra-realistic streetwear collab magazine cover featuring a stylish {argument name="subject" default="Korean woman"} in a {argument name="brand" default="New Balance"} colour-coded look — a sport-prep bomber jacket and matching straight-leg joggers in the shoe's colourway — holding a {argument name="shoe model" default="New Balance 1906R"} up in one hand at shoulder height with a proud collector's grip. Sleek straight hair with micro-fringe, bold editorial makeup, metallic liner. Background: clean stark white studio with a single large New Balance graphic wall installation, product shadow casting graphically on the floor. "HIGHSNOBIETY" masthead in editorial black bold with collab logo callout. 50mm lens, ultra-detailed ABZORB midsole and mesh upper detail, 8K photorealistic. 

Negative: cartoon, blurry, incorrect shoe, watermark, distorted.

zh.title: 韩系街头潮流杂志封面设计
zh.description: 一份关于街头潮流杂志封面的高细节提示词，包含特定的服装、造型和影棚灯光元素，旨在打造专业的编辑视觉效果。
zh.prompt:
超写实街头潮流联名杂志封面，主角为一位身着 {argument name="brand" default="New Balance"} 配色造型的 {argument name="subject" default="韩国女性"} —— 穿着与鞋款配色呼应的运动风棒球夹克和配套直筒慢跑裤，单手在肩部高度以收藏家自豪的姿态展示着一双 {argument name="shoe model" default="New Balance 1906R"}。利落的直发搭配微刘海，大胆的编辑风格妆容，金属感眼线。背景：简洁纯净的白色影棚，墙面设有大型 New Balance 图形装置，产品阴影在地面投射出几何美感。“HIGHSNOBIETY” 刊头采用编辑风格的黑色粗体字，并标注联名 Logo。50mm 镜头，超细节的 ABZORB 中底和网面材质细节，8K 照片级画质。

负面提示词：卡通、模糊、鞋子错误、水印、畸变。

en.title: Candid Black and White Bedroom Portrait
en.description: Creates an atmospheric black and white portrait of a woman in a dim bedroom, focusing on natural textures, lighting, and emotional depth.
en.prompt: Close-up portrait, 85mm f/1.4, a {argument name="subject description" default="young East Asian woman in her early 20s"} sits at the edge of her bed in a dim bedroom, hunched slightly forward, elbows on knees, face tilted down in thought, authentic daily life photography, natural candid moment. Almond-shaped eyes with downcast gaze aimed at the floor, expression contained and held — not crying, not calm, somewhere in the held-breath space between. Strong jaw slightly tensed. Straight black hair falls forward around her face, curtaining partially. Skin with natural texture, visible fine lines around eyes from tiredness, subsurface scattering under low side lamp light. She wears an {argument name="clothing" default="oversized men's cotton shirt"}, buttons partially done, hem long over thighs. Phone held loosely in one hand beside her knee, not being looked at. Several stray hairs fall forward with gravity, not arranged. Black and white rendering. Low key: single bedside lamp as only light source, positioned low and to one side, casting half her face in deep shadow with soft falloff — shadow side retains detail and tonal gradation, not crushed to black. Mid-tones preserved in shirt fabric and bedding texture. Grain structure visible and tactile, ISO 800 film grain, photographic texture not CG render smoothness. Aspect ratio 4:5. No watermark, no text overlay, not cartoon, not digitally painted, not illustration, not anime.

zh.title: 卧室黑白纪实肖像
zh.description: 在昏暗的卧室中创作一张充满氛围感的女性黑白肖像，聚焦于自然的质感、光影及情感深度。
zh.prompt: 特写肖像，85mm f/1.4 镜头，一位 {argument name="subject description" default="20 出头的东亚年轻女性"} 坐在昏暗卧室的床边，身体微微前倾，手肘撑在膝盖上，面部低垂陷入沉思，真实的日常生活摄影，自然的抓拍瞬间。杏仁眼，目光低垂看向地面，神情克制而内敛——并非哭泣，也非平静，处于一种屏息般的微妙状态。紧致的下颌线微微紧绷。直顺的黑发垂落在脸颊两侧，形成部分遮挡。皮肤呈现自然质感，眼周可见因疲惫产生的细纹，在低位侧灯照射下呈现次表面散射效果。她穿着一件 {argument name="clothing" default="超大款男士棉质衬衫"}，扣子随意扣着，下摆盖过大腿。手机松散地握在膝盖旁的一只手中，并未注视。几缕碎发自然垂落，未经刻意打理。黑白呈现。低调摄影：以单盏床头灯为唯一光源，位置较低且偏向一侧，使半张脸隐入深影，光影过渡柔和——阴影部分保留细节与色调层次，并未完全死黑。衬衫面料与床品纹理保留了丰富的中间调。可见明显的颗粒感，ISO 800 胶片颗粒，呈现摄影质感而非 CG 渲染的平滑感。长宽比 4:5。无水印，无文字覆盖，非卡通，非数字绘画，非插画，非动漫。

en.title: Realistic Cartographer Character Design Sheet
en.description: A detailed character sheet prompt for creating front, side, and back views of a realistic cartographer character named Wren in a dystopian setting.
en.prompt: A highly detailed realistic character design sheet for "{argument name="character name" default="WREN"}" — the last known cartographer in a world where all digital maps were destroyed. Front, side, back view. Age {argument name="age" default="26"}, slight build but enduring, paint and ink permanently stained fingers.

zh.title: 写实风格制图师角色设计图
zh.description: 一份详细的角色设计提示词，用于在反乌托邦背景下创建名为 Wren 的写实风格制图师角色的正面、侧面和背面视图。
zh.prompt: 一份高度详细的写实风格角色设计图，主角是“{argument name="character name" default="WREN"}”——在这个所有数字地图都被摧毁的世界里，她是最后一位已知的制图师。包含正面、侧面和背面视图。年龄 {argument name="age" default="26"}，身材略显单薄但坚韧，手指上永久留有颜料和墨水的痕迹。

en.title: Premium Office Furniture Commercial Storyboard
en.description: A professional cinematic storyboard prompt designed for a premium office furniture collection, focusing on ultra-premium workspace design and architectural aesthetics.
en.prompt: Create a professional cinematic commercial storyboard in 16:9 landscape format, designed like a premium shot list presentation for a {argument name="collection name" default="KAIRO OBSIDIAN DESK"} premium office collection product ad. Overall design: Ultra-premium workspace design art

zh.title: 高端办公家具商业项目
zh.description: 专为高端办公家具系列设计的专业电影级项目提示词，聚焦于超高端工作空间设计与建筑美学。
zh.prompt: 创建一个 16:9 横屏格式的专业电影级商业项目，设计风格参考高端拍摄列表演示，用于 {argument name="collection name" default="KAIRO OBSIDIAN DESK"} 高端办公系列产品广告。整体设计：超高端工作空间设计艺术

en.title: Happy Tengu Samurai Concept Art
en.description: A stylized full-body character design of a laughing masked wandering samurai for fantasy concept art or game character inspiration.
en.prompt: Create a full-body character concept illustration of a {argument name="character name" default="Happy Samurai"}: a tall, lean, shirtless wandering samurai standing relaxed against a plain warm off-white background. He wears a vivid red tengu/oni-style mask with an extremely long pointed nose, two tall horns, dark expressive eye openings, and a wide laughing open mouth, giving him a mischievous happy expression. Small purple flowers are tucked near the mask and hair. Pose him in a casual contrapposto stance, one arm draped lazily over a long black sheathed katana or staff balanced horizontally across his shoulders, the weapon stretching far beyond both sides of his body; the right end has a black-and-gold diamond-wrapped handle and dangling tassel, the left end is a dark scabbard with subtle fittings. Dress him in tattered layered samurai clothing: a loose pale gray-blue haori slipping off one shoulder, dark green inner robe panels hanging raggedly, oversized dark blue hakama pants cropped above the ankles, a thick tan rope belt tied in a large knot at the waist, and straw rope sandals on bare feet. Use angular painterly brushwork, high-fashion character design proportions, sharp cel-shaded planes, rough ink-like edges, visible fabric tears and folds, earthy muted colors with strong black accents, minimal ground shadow, and lots of negative space. No text, no border, no watermark.

zh.title: 快乐天狗武士概念艺术
zh.description: 一款风格化的全身角色设计，描绘了一位戴着面具、放声大笑的浪人武士，适用于奇幻概念艺术或游戏角色灵感。
zh.prompt: 创作一张全身角色概念插画，角色为 {argument name="character name" default="快乐武士"}：一位身材高挑、精瘦、赤裸上身的浪人武士，在温暖的灰白色纯色背景前放松站立。他戴着一个鲜红色的天狗/鬼怪风格面具，面具长着极长的尖鼻子和两只高耸的角，深邃而富有表现力的眼眶，以及一张开怀大笑的嘴，流露出顽皮快乐的神情。面具和发间点缀着几朵紫色小花。让他摆出随意的对立式站姿，一只手臂懒散地搭在横跨双肩的长柄黑色武士刀或法杖上，武器向身体两侧延伸；右端是黑金配色的菱形缠柄和悬挂的流苏，左端是带有精致配件的深色刀鞘。他穿着破旧的层叠武士服：一件从一侧肩头滑落的宽松浅灰蓝色羽织，深绿色内袍边缘破烂，超大号深蓝色袴裤裤脚在脚踝上方，腰间系着一个粗大的棕褐色绳结，赤脚穿着草绳凉鞋。采用棱角分明的绘画笔触、高级时尚的角色设计比例、锐利的赛璐珞阴影面、粗犷的墨迹边缘、清晰可见的布料撕裂与褶皱、大地色调与强烈的黑色点缀，地面阴影极小，并留有大量负空间。无文字，无边框，无水印。

en.title: Red Suit Fashion Editorial Portrait
en.description: Generates a photorealistic luxury studio fashion portrait of a seated male model in a tailored red suit for editorial or campaign visuals.
en.prompt: Create an ultra-realistic luxury fashion editorial portrait in a 4:5 vertical aspect ratio. A young Black male model with short close-cropped black hair and smooth skin sits confidently on a modern black chair in a studio. He wears a perfectly tailored glossy {argument name="suit color" default="deep crimson red"} two-piece suit with a fitted blazer and slim trousers, a crisp {argument name="shirt color" default="white"} dress shirt, a {argument name="tie color" default="dark navy"} tie, black dress socks, and polished black leather oxford shoes. His pose is relaxed and composed: body angled slightly toward camera, legs spread naturally, one forearm draped over the chair back with the hand hanging down, the other hand resting on his thigh, shoulders squared, direct calm gaze into the lens, neutral serious expression. Use a seamless {argument name="background color" default="deep red"} studio backdrop and matching glossy floor with subtle reflections. Lighting should feel like a premium fashion campaign: soft frontal key light, gentle highlights on the suit fabric, controlled shadows, sharp facial detail, realistic skin texture, clean tailoring lines, high-end editorial styling. Frame as a full-body seated portrait with the chair fully visible, centered slightly left, no props beyond the chair, no text, no watermark, photorealistic studio photography, polished magazine-cover quality.

zh.title: 红色西装时尚杂志人像
zh.description: 生成一张写实风格的奢华摄影棚时尚人像，展示一名身着定制红色西装的男性模特坐姿，适用于编辑或广告视觉内容。
zh.prompt: 创作一张超写实的奢华时尚杂志人像，比例为 4:5 竖构图。一位留着短寸黑发、皮肤细腻的年轻黑人男性模特，自信地坐在摄影棚内的一把现代黑色椅子上。他身穿一套剪裁完美的亮面 {argument name="suit color" default="深绯红色"} 两件套西装，搭配修身西装外套和窄腿裤，内衬一件挺括的 {argument name="shirt color" default="白色"} 衬衫，系着一条 {argument name="tie color" default="深海军蓝"} 领带，穿着黑色正装袜和擦得锃亮的黑色牛津皮鞋。姿势放松且从容：身体略微朝向镜头，双腿自然分开，一只前臂搭在椅背上，手自然下垂，另一只手放在大腿上，双肩平直，目光平静地直视镜头，表情严肃中性。使用无缝的 {argument name="background color" default="深红色"} 摄影棚背景，地面与背景色调一致且带有细腻的反射光泽。灯光效果应呈现出高端时尚广告的质感：柔和的正面主光，西装面料上的细腻高光，受控的阴影，清晰的面部细节，真实的皮肤纹理，利落的剪裁线条，高端杂志的造型风格。构图为全身坐姿人像，椅子完整可见，主体略微偏左，除椅子外无其他道具，无文字，无水印，写实摄影棚摄影，杂志封面级品质。

en.title: Sunny Seaside Anime Manga Page
en.description: Generates a seven-panel romantic slice-of-life anime manga page set on a bright harbor promenade with Chinese dialogue.
en.prompt:
Goal: Create a full-color manga page in a bright, polished anime style about {argument name="character name" default="a young man and a petite silver-haired girl"} meeting at a sunny seaside promenade and walking toward a subway station.

Canvas: Vertical comic page, portrait orientation, with thick black panel borders and narrow gutters. Use a clean Japanese manga/anime illustration style, detailed backgrounds, soft cel shading, sparkling water highlights, expressive faces, and a warm summer atmosphere.

Layout: Use exactly 7 comic panels. Panel 1 is a wide panoramic establishing shot across the full top width. Panel 2 is the left half of the second row. Panel 3 is the right half of the second row. Panel 4 is the left half of the third row. Panel 5 is the right half of the third row. Panel 6 is the bottom-left close-up panel. Panel 7 is the bottom-right wide walking-away panel.

Setting details: The location is {argument name="location" default="a Japanese harbor promenade by a sparkling blue sea"}. Show a stone seawall with square posts connected by black chains, a vast calm ocean with glittering sunlight, fluffy cumulus clouds, distant green islands, port cranes, industrial harbor buildings, and a blue summer sky. The final panel should show a tree-lined pedestrian path leading to a subway entrance with a blue sign marked with a subway icon and Chinese characters for subway station.

Characters: The male lead is a slim young adult with short black hair, fair skin, thin rectangular glasses, a plain white T-shirt, beige shorts or pants, and a gentle, slightly shy expression. The female lead is a very petite anime girl with long flowing pale lavender-silver hair, large blue eyes, fair skin, a white puff-sleeve blouse, blue denim short overalls, small hairpins, and an energetic cute personality. Her hair should flow dramatically in the sea breeze.

Panel-by-panel action: Panel 1: panoramic harbor and sea view, no characters in the foreground, with a vertical narration box near the upper right. Panel 2: the young man stands near the chain fence in profile, looking out over the sea, with a vertical narration box on the left. Panel 3: close view of sparkling ocean water and chain fence, with a vertical narration box on the right and two small pink sound-effect words floating over the water. Panel 4: close-up of the young man turning his head in surprise while the silver-haired girl runs toward him from behind, smiling; include a small surprise symbol near his face and a speech bubble from the girl. Panel 5: the two characters face each other at the waterfront; the man smiles awkwardly with one hand in his pocket, and the girl looks up at him with bright curiosity; include two vertical speech bubbles. Panel 6: cute close-up of the girl blushing slightly and holding her hands near her chest, with a pastel pink sparkly background behind her and a vertical speech bubble. Panel 7: rear view of both characters holding hands and walking toward the subway entrance; the girl leads excitedly, the boy follows, and a vertical speech bubble appears on the right.

Text content: Include Chinese vertical manga text in white speech bubbles and narration boxes. Use this complete set of visible text as the model's guide: {argument name="Chinese manga text" default="清晨，海边 / 看着一望无际的海边，我心情有多舒畅，我已经差过了多久，今天不一样的是，多了一个激活 / 轻微的海浪拍声让人愉悦的海风，时而飞过的海鸥，高楼与繁忙的港口，脚步声越来越清晰。 / 哒 哒 / 久等了 / 没关系的，我也是刚到 / 福乃酱没必要这么急的 / 没有啦，碰到了喜欢的地方就...外面也就是了地铁站吧 / 走走走！地铁站在那边！♡"}. Keep the text handwritten or manga-lettered, vertically arranged where appropriate.

Visual style: High-resolution anime comic art, bright saturated blues, crisp linework, soft shadows, gentle lens-like sparkle on the water, cute romantic slice-of-life mood. The girl should look adorable and lively; the boy should look calm and kind. Keep backgrounds detailed and consistent across panels.

Constraints: Use exactly 7 panels, exactly 2 main characters, exactly 1 subway entrance sign in the final panel, exactly 2 pink water sound effects in panel 3, and no extra characters. Preserve the clean manga-page composition with black borders and readable speech bubbles.

zh.title: 阳光海滨动漫漫画页面
zh.description: 生成一个七格浪漫生活类动漫漫画页面，背景设定在明亮的港口长廊，并包含中文对话。
zh.prompt:
目标：创作一页全彩漫画，采用明亮、精致的动漫风格，讲述 {argument name="character name" default="一位年轻男子和一位娇小的银发少女"} 在阳光明媚的海滨长廊相遇并走向地铁站的故事。

画布：竖版漫画页面，纵向构图，带有粗黑的边框和窄小的分镜间距。使用简洁的日式漫画/动漫插画风格，背景细节丰富，柔和的赛璐珞阴影，波光粼粼的水面高光，表情生动，营造出温暖的夏日氛围。

布局：使用 7 个漫画分镜。第 1 格为顶部贯穿全宽的宽幅全景镜头。第 2 格为第二行左半部分。第 3 格为第二行右半部分。第 4 格为第三行左半部分。第 5 格为第三行右半部分。第 6 格为左下角的特写镜头。第 7 格为右下角两人背影远去的宽幅镜头。

场景细节：地点位于 {argument name="location" default="波光粼粼的蓝色大海旁的一处日式港口长廊"}。展示带有黑色链条连接方柱的石质海堤、广阔平静且闪烁着阳光的海面、蓬松的积雨云、远处的绿色岛屿、港口起重机、工业港口建筑以及蓝色的夏日天空。最后一格应展示一条绿树成荫的步行道，通向一个地铁入口，入口处有带有地铁图标和“地铁站”字样的蓝色标志。

角色：男主角是一位身材苗条的年轻男性，留着黑色短发，皮肤白皙，戴着细长方形眼镜，穿着简单的白色 T 恤和米色短裤或长裤，表情温和且略显羞涩。女主角是一位非常娇小的动漫少女，留着飘逸的淡薰衣草银色长发，大大的蓝色眼睛，皮肤白皙，穿着白色泡泡袖衬衫和蓝色牛仔短背带裤，戴着小发夹，性格活泼可爱。她的头发应在海风中呈现出戏剧性的飘动感。

分镜动作：第 1 格：港口与大海的全景，前景无角色，右上角附近有一个竖排旁白框。第 2 格：男主角侧身站在链条围栏旁，眺望大海，左侧有一个竖排旁白框。第 3 格：波光粼粼的海水与链条围栏的特写，右侧有一个竖排旁白框，水面上漂浮着两个粉色的拟声词。第 4 格：男主角惊讶地转过头，银发少女从身后跑向他，面带微笑；在他脸部附近加入一个小小的惊讶符号，并配有少女的对话气泡。第 5 格：两个角色在水边面对面；男子尴尬地微笑着，一只手插在口袋里，少女好奇地抬头看着他；包含两个竖排对话气泡。第 6 格：少女略带羞涩的可爱特写，双手放在胸前，背景为粉彩色的闪光效果，配有一个竖排对话气泡。第 7 格：两人牵手走向地铁入口的背影；少女兴奋地领路，男孩跟随，右侧出现一个竖排对话气泡。

文本内容：在白色对话气泡和旁白框中加入竖排中文漫画文字。请将以下完整的文本作为模型的指南：{argument name="Chinese manga text" default="清晨，海边 / 看着一望无际的海边，我心情有多舒畅，我已经差过了多久，今天不一样的是，多了一个激活 / 轻微的海浪拍声让人愉悦的海风，时而飞过的海鸥，高楼与繁忙的港口，脚步声越来越清晰。 / 哒 哒 / 久等了 / 没关系的，我也是刚到 / 福乃酱没必要这么急的 / 没有啦，碰到了喜欢的地方就...外面也就是了地铁站吧 / 走走走！地铁站在那边！♡"}。文字应保持手写体或漫画字体，并在适当位置进行竖排排列。

视觉风格：高分辨率动漫漫画艺术，明亮饱和的蓝色，清晰的线条，柔和的阴影，水面上轻柔的镜头式闪光，可爱的浪漫生活氛围。少女应看起来活泼可爱；男孩应看起来冷静友善。保持背景在各分镜中的细节一致性。

约束条件：使用 7 个分镜，2 个主要角色，最后一格包含 1 个地铁入口标志，第 3 格包含 2 个粉色水面拟声词，且不添加额外角色。保持简洁的漫画页面构图，使用黑色边框和清晰易读的对话气泡。

en.title: Tang Dynasty Fantasy Triptych
en.description: A cinematic three-panel Chinese fantasy portrait prompt for creating palace cloud scenes with ornate Tang Dynasty fashion, cranes, floating jewelry, and petals.
en.prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical cinematic Oriental fantasy fashion-photography triptych featuring {argument name="character name" default="a young Tang Dynasty noblewoman"} in luxurious palace attire, surrounded by dreamlike clouds, cranes, floating jewelry, and falling petals.

Canvas: Tall vertical 9:16 poster layout with exactly 3 movie-still panels: 1 large panel across the entire top half, and 2 equal smaller panels side-by-side on the bottom half, separated by thin white borders. Use ultra-detailed gpt-image-2 realism, soft bloom, shallow depth of field, warm golden-pink highlights, delicate haze, and high-end cinematic color grading.

Panel 1, top large scene: The noblewoman reclines among thick pastel pink cloud banks inside a dark wooden Tang Dynasty palace hall. Latticed windows glow behind her with diffused sunlight, and a shadowy ornamental silhouette stands in the background. She wears an elaborate high black updo with gold hairpins, dangling chains, floral ornaments, and forehead jewelry. Her expression is dreamy and slightly melancholic, looking off to the side. Around her float exactly 7 ornate objects: 1 golden comb above her head, 1 branch-like gold hairpin to the upper left, 1 flower-and-chain ornament above right, 1 long dangling earring-like ornament to the right, 1 pearl bubble strand at far left, 1 jeweled sphere at lower left, and 1 small floral jewel cluster near the lower center. Add pale pink clouds, tiny petals, soft sparkles, and detailed embroidered fabric.

Panel 2, bottom left scene: The same woman stands near tall palace windows and ornate carved screens, wearing the same Tang-inspired outfit and jewelry. She faces forward with a calm, wistful expression while one hand touches her hair and another hand from off-frame adjusts her sleeve, suggesting attendants. The background opens to a misty cloud sea and a flower-filled garden. Include exactly 4 cranes: 1 large crane flying at upper left, 1 crane flying near upper right, 1 standing crane at lower left, and 1 darker crane shape near the lower middle distance. Keep lighting warm, backlit, and hazy.

Panel 3, bottom right scene: The noblewoman stands outdoors near a lakeside terrace with distant hills and a bright blue sky. She tilts her head slightly upward, serene and elegant. She wears a deep teal embroidered robe over a red-and-gold brocade dress with a structured red waist sash, pearl chains, layered necklaces, and a red flower in her hair. Include exactly 3 cranes in this panel: 1 flying crane near the upper left, 1 white crane at the far right, and 1 small distant crane near the middle. Include exactly 4 floating jeweled objects: 2 translucent crystal spheres, 1 ornate jade-like pendant, and 1 small red gem. Add falling pink petals and soft lens bloom.

Subject details: The woman has pale porcelain skin, delicate East Asian facial features, glossy black hair in a towering Tang Dynasty coiffure, refined makeup, a small forehead adornment, and a graceful posture. Her outfit colors are {argument name="robe colors" default="deep teal, crimson red, antique gold, and soft rose"}; fabrics should show dense floral embroidery, metallic thread, beadwork, pearls, and layered translucent sleeves.

Visual style: {argument name="visual style" default="cinematic Chinese fantasy realism"}, highly detailed textures, ethereal cloud sea, palace-window rim light, volumetric haze, soft pink-gold atmosphere, luxury historical costume photography, romantic and otherworldly mood.

Constraints: No text, no watermark, no modern objects, no extra panels. Preserve exactly 3 panels, exactly 7 floating ornate objects in the top panel, exactly 4 cranes in the bottom-left panel, and exactly 3 cranes plus 4 floating jeweled objects in the bottom-right panel.

zh.title: 大唐奇幻三联画
zh.description: 一款电影级三联画中国奇幻肖像提示词，用于创作包含华丽唐代服饰、仙鹤、漂浮珠宝和花瓣的宫廷云雾场景。
zh.prompt:
目标：创作一幅垂直电影级东方奇幻时尚摄影三联画，主角为 {argument name="character name" default="一位年轻的唐代贵族女子"}，身着奢华宫廷服饰，置身于梦幻般的云海、仙鹤、漂浮珠宝和飘落花瓣之中。

画布：高垂直 9:16 海报布局，包含 3 个电影剧照面板：顶部一半为一个大面板，底部一半为两个并排的等大面板，面板间以细白边分隔。使用超精细的 gpt-image-2 写实风格、柔光效果、浅景深、温暖的金色与粉色高光、细腻的薄雾以及高端电影级调色。

面板 1（顶部大场景）：贵族女子斜倚在深色木质唐代宫殿大厅内浓厚的淡粉色云层中。她身后的格子窗透出柔和的阳光，背景中隐约可见装饰性的剪影。她梳着精致的高耸黑色发髻，佩戴金簪、垂坠链条、花卉饰品和额饰。她神情梦幻且略带忧郁，望向侧方。她周围漂浮着 7 件华丽物品：头顶上方 1 把金梳，左上方 1 支树枝状金簪，右上方 1 件花卉链条饰品，右侧 1 件长垂坠耳饰状饰品，最左侧 1 串珍珠气泡，左下方 1 个珠宝球，以及靠近左下中心的 1 簇小型花卉珠宝。添加淡粉色云朵、细小花瓣、柔和闪光以及精细的刺绣面料。

面板 2（左下场景）：同一女子站在高大的宫殿窗户和华丽的雕花屏风旁，身着同样的唐风服饰和珠宝。她面朝前方，神情平静而怀旧，一只手轻触头发，另一只手从画外伸出调整她的衣袖，暗示有侍从在场。背景展现出云雾缭绕的云海和花团锦簇的庭院。包含 4 只仙鹤：左上方 1 只飞翔的大仙鹤，右上方附近 1 只飞翔的仙鹤，左下方 1 只站立的仙鹤，以及中下方远处 1 只较暗的仙鹤剪影。保持光线温暖、逆光且朦胧。

面板 3（右下场景）：贵族女子站在湖畔露台户外，远处是群山和明亮的蓝天。她微微仰头，神态宁静优雅。她身着深青色刺绣长袍，内搭红金锦缎裙，系红色腰带，佩戴珍珠链、叠戴项链，发间插着一朵红花。此面板包含 3 只仙鹤：左上方附近 1 只飞鹤，最右侧 1 只白鹤，中间附近 1 只远处的仙鹤。包含 4 件漂浮的珠宝物品：2 个半透明水晶球，1 个华丽的玉质吊坠，以及 1 颗小红宝石。添加飘落的粉色花瓣和柔和的镜头光晕。

主体细节：女子拥有白皙如瓷的皮肤、精致的东亚面部特征、梳成高耸唐代发髻的乌黑亮发、精致的妆容、额间饰品和优雅的姿态。服装颜色为 {argument name="robe colors" default="深青色、绯红色、古金色和柔粉色"}；面料应展现出密集的刺绣花纹、金属线、珠饰、珍珠和层叠的半透明袖口。

视觉风格：{argument name="visual style" default="电影级中国奇幻写实风格"}，高度精细的纹理，空灵的云海，宫殿窗户的轮廓光，体积雾，柔和的粉金色氛围，奢华历史服装摄影，浪漫且超凡脱俗的意境。

约束条件：无文字，无水印，无现代物品，无额外面板。必须保留 3 个面板，顶部面板包含 7 件漂浮的华丽物品，左下面板包含 4 只仙鹤，右下面板包含 3 只仙鹤和 4 件漂浮的珠宝物品。

en.title: Cinematic Xianxia Prompt Poster
en.description: Generates a Chinese infographic prompt card showcasing cinematic Eastern xianxia portrait examples and copyable GPT Image-2 prompt guidance.
en.prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical Chinese social-media infographic poster teaching a cinematic Eastern xianxia portrait prompt for {argument name="model name" default="GPT Image-2"}, with a premium dark movie-poster aesthetic and a large rounded white content card.

Canvas: 3:4 vertical poster, dark charcoal-black background with subtle warm bokeh and faint floral haze. Center a large off-white rounded rectangle panel with soft shadow and thin border, leaving a narrow dark margin around it.

Header: At the top, outside or slightly above the white card, place a large pink-white Chinese headline: {argument name="headline text" default="电影级东方仙侠写真提示词"}. Under it, add a smaller white subtitle: {argument name="subtitle text" default="适配 GPT Image-2 完整版"}. Add a tiny centered tagline row beneath: “盛唐宫廷 / 梦幻云海 / 柔焦光影 / 超现实漂浮 / 电影质感”.

Layout: Inside the white panel use a two-column layout. The left column is text-heavy, about 48% width. The right column is a vertical gallery, about 52% width, containing exactly 3 cinematic sample images stacked with rounded corners and thin borders. Each sample has a small pink Chinese label above it: 1) “版本一：云海软榻”, 2) “版本二：仙鹤宫殿”, 3) “版本三：花瓣云端”.

Left column content: Use pink section headings with small circular icons. First section title: “核心提示词（复制使用）”. Under it, set dense black Chinese body text describing a cinematic realistic portrait of an adult ancient Chinese court woman in Tang-style xianxia fashion, including fair skin, delicate features, ornate updo, gold hairpins, pearl tassels, turquoise-blue gauze outer robe, crimson palace bodice, embroidered silk, jewelry, cloud sea, cranes, petals, gemstones, dreamy lighting, bloom, soft glow, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, cinematic grading, ultra realistic, 8K, HDR, RAW photo, Kodak Portra 400, Unreal cinematic, volumetric light, masterpiece, best quality. Include some English technical phrases mixed into the Chinese text exactly like a prompt sheet.

Negative prompt block: Below the main prompt, add a pink X icon and the heading “负面提示词（避免出现）”. Add a compact paragraph in English: “low quality, blurry, CGI, anime, cartoon, 3D render, doll face, wax skin, modern clothes, text, watermark, bad anatomy, extra fingers, deformed hands, oversaturated, bad proportions, ugly face, jpeg artifacts”.

Keyword block: Add a divider line, then the heading “风格关键词”. Show exactly 10 rounded beige pill tags in two rows: 1) 盛唐宫廷, 2) 东方仙侠, 3) 梦幻云海, 4) 漂浮饰品, 5) 仙鹤, 6) 柔焦胶片, 7) 逆光体积光, 8) 华丽珠宝, 9) 青绿×暗红, 10) 超浅景深.

Usage advice block: Add the heading “使用建议” and exactly 3 bullet points in Chinese: 1) “直接复制【核心提示词】到 GPT Image-2 使用”, 2) “根据需要选择版本一/二/三的描述进行微调”, 3) “可添加 ‘9:16 竖版’ 或 ‘3:4 竖版’ 来控制画面比例”.

Right gallery image details: All 3 images feature the same {argument name="character description" default="young adult Chinese xianxia court beauty with ornate black updo, gold phoenix crown, pearl tassels, fair skin, crimson embroidered bodice, teal translucent silk robe, elaborate jewelry"}. Image 1 shows her reclining among pink clouds inside a dim palace, with floating flowers, warm window light, and surreal dreamy haze. Image 2 shows her seated by a palace window or terrace overlooking a lake with exactly 3 visible cranes, warm sunset mist, dark interior frame, and soft cinematic side light. Image 3 shows her standing or leaning on a balcony above a glowing sea of clouds, petals flying, cranes in the sky, golden backlight, teal and crimson flowing robes, epic romantic atmosphere.

Visual style: Elegant Chinese editorial layout, pale blush-pink typography, clean sans-serif Chinese fonts, cinematic soft contrast, warm highlights, subtle grain, premium Xiaohongshu-style prompt card. Keep the poster information-dense but readable.

Footer: At the bottom left on the dark margin, add a tiny gray copyright-style line: “© 提示词创作分享｜用 AI 复制电影级东方美学”.

Constraints: Use exactly 3 gallery images and exactly 10 keyword tags. Keep all Chinese text crisp and legible. Avoid logos, watermarks, UI chrome, random extra sections, or additional sample images.

zh.title: 电影级仙侠提示词海报
zh.description: 生成一张中文信息图提示词卡片，展示电影级东方仙侠人像示例及可复制的 GPT Image-2 提示词指南。
zh.prompt:
目标：制作一张竖版中文社交媒体信息图海报，用于教授 {argument name="model name" default="GPT Image-2"} 的电影级东方仙侠人像提示词，采用高级暗色电影海报美学，并配以大尺寸圆角白色内容卡片。

画布：3:4 竖版海报，深炭黑色背景，带有细腻的暖色光斑和淡淡的花瓣薄雾。中心放置一个大尺寸灰白色圆角矩形面板，带有柔和阴影和细边框，周围留出窄窄的深色边距。

标题：在顶部（白色卡片外或上方），放置一个醒目的粉白色中文大标题：{argument name="headline text" default="电影级东方仙侠写真提示词"}。下方添加较小的白色副标题：{argument name="subtitle text" default="适配 GPT Image-2 完整版"}。在下方添加一行居中的微型标签：“盛唐宫廷 / 梦幻云海 / 柔焦光影 / 超现实漂浮 / 电影质感”。

布局：白色面板内采用双栏布局。左侧栏为文字密集区，宽度约 48%。右侧栏为竖向画廊，宽度约 52%，包含 3 张电影级示例图片，图片采用圆角和细边框设计。每张示例上方均有一个粉色中文小标签：1) “版本一：云海软榻”，2) “版本二：仙鹤宫殿”，3) “版本三：花瓣云端”。

左侧栏内容：使用带有圆形小图标的粉色章节标题。第一部分标题：“核心提示词（复制使用）”。下方设置密集的黑色中文正文，描述一位唐风仙侠造型的成年中国古代宫廷女性电影级写实人像，包括：白皙皮肤、精致五官、华丽发髻、金钗、珍珠流苏、青蓝色薄纱外袍、深红色宫廷抹胸、刺绣丝绸、珠宝、云海、仙鹤、花瓣、宝石、梦幻光影、花卉、柔光、85mm 镜头、浅景深、电影级调色、超写实、8K、HDR、RAW 照片、Kodak Portra 400、Unreal 电影质感、体积光、杰作、最高画质。在中文文本中混入部分英文技术词汇，保持提示词文档的专业感。

负面提示词区块：在主提示词下方，添加一个粉色 X 图标和标题“负面提示词（避免出现）”。添加一段简洁的英文段落：“low quality, blurry, CGI, anime, cartoon, 3D render, doll face, wax skin, modern clothes, text, watermark, bad anatomy, extra fingers, deformed hands, oversaturated, bad proportions, ugly face, jpeg artifacts”。

关键词区块：添加一条分割线，随后是标题“风格关键词”。展示 10 个圆角米色胶囊标签，分两行排列：1) 盛唐宫廷，2) 东方仙侠，3) 梦幻云海，4) 漂浮饰品，5) 仙鹤，6) 柔焦胶片，7) 逆光体积光，8) 华丽珠宝，9) 青绿×暗红，10) 超浅景深。

使用建议区块：添加标题“使用建议”及 3 条中文要点：1) “直接复制【核心提示词】到 GPT Image-2 使用”，2) “根据需要选择版本一/二/三的描述进行微调”，3) “可添加 ‘9:16 竖版’ 或 ‘3:4 竖版’ 来控制画面比例”。

右侧画廊图片细节：3 张图片均呈现同一角色：{argument name="character description" default="年轻的中国仙侠宫廷美女，配有华丽黑色发髻、金凤冠、珍珠流苏、白皙皮肤、深红色刺绣抹胸、青色半透明丝绸长袍、精致珠宝"}。图片 1 展示她斜倚在昏暗宫殿的粉色云朵间，伴有漂浮花朵、温暖窗光和超现实梦幻薄雾。图片 2 展示她坐在宫殿窗边或露台上，俯瞰湖泊，可见 3 只仙鹤，暖色日落薄雾，深色室内框架，以及柔和的电影级侧光。图片 3 展示她站在或倚靠在云海之上的阳台上，花瓣飞舞，仙鹤在天空中盘旋，金色逆光，青红交织的飘逸长袍，史诗般的浪漫氛围。

视觉风格：优雅的中国式编辑排版，淡腮红粉色字体，简洁的无衬线中文字体，电影级柔和对比度，暖色高光，细腻噪点，高级小红书风格提示词卡片。保持海报信息密集但易于阅读。

页脚：在左下方的深色边距处，添加一行微小的灰色版权风格文字：“© 提示词创作分享｜用 AI 复制电影级东方美学”。

约束：使用 3 张画廊图片和 10 个关键词标签。保持所有中文文本清晰易读。避免使用 Logo、水印、UI 界面元素、随机额外板块或额外的示例图片。

en.title: Chang'e Lotus Dance Storyboard
en.description: Generates a 3×3 cinematic Chinese mythology storyboard poster of Chang'e dancing on lotus leaves in the moonlit heavenly Yaochi pond.
en.prompt:
Goal: Create a Chinese classical mythology cinematic storyboard poster titled {argument name="poster title" default="《嫦娥仙子·瑶池荷上舞》九宫格分镜图"}, showing Chang'e performing an elegant continuous classical dance on giant lotus leaves in the heavenly Yaochi pond.

Canvas: Square 1:1 poster, arranged as an exact 3×3 grid with thin dark divider lines, like a film director's storyboard contact sheet. Add a narrow decorative bottom title strip with small ornamental flourishes and the centered Chinese title. Each panel should feel like a standalone fantasy painting while also connecting into one complete dance sequence.

Visual style: Ultra-detailed cinematic Chinese myth fantasy, moonlit blue-silver palette, romantic and ethereal, soft mist, sparkling water reflections, luminous full moon, starry night sky, distant golden palace pavilions and lanterns, lotus blossoms and broad lotus leaves across the heavenly lake. Use realistic digital painting with delicate silk textures, high detail, gentle glow, and graceful motion blur in flowing fabric.

Main subject: {argument name="character name" default="Chang'e fairy"}, a beautiful Chinese goddess with long black hair, ornate silver-and-jade hair ornaments, pale luminous skin, serene expression, and a layered flowing {argument name="dress color" default="white and ice-blue"} Hanfu dance costume with translucent gauze sleeves and long ribbons. She dances barefoot or lightly standing on enormous lotus leaves above reflective water.

Layout and panel content: Include exactly 9 numbered panels, each with a circled number in the upper-left corner and Chinese stage directions in white/gold calligraphy-style text. The 9 panels are: 1) “月下登场” — Chang'e enters under the moon, standing side-on on a giant lotus leaf, veil trailing behind her. 2) “轻扬云袖” — she raises both cloud sleeves, arms opening outward, silk sleeves floating in the air. 3) “俯身掬水” — she bends down to touch or scoop water, droplets and ripples sparkling beside the lotus leaf. 4) “莲步轻移” — she steps delicately across the lotus leaves with one arm extended, hem and ribbons sweeping low. 5) “旋转舒展” — central spinning pose, dress and sleeves spread in a circular whirl, add white motion arcs around her. 6) “轻跃回身” — she leaps and turns back, skirt and ribbons flying dramatically to the side. 7) “举臂望月” — she raises one arm toward the full moon and gazes upward, a proud elegant silhouette. 8) “缓缓收势” — she slows and gathers the dance, seated or lowering gracefully on the lotus leaf with relaxed flowing sleeves. 9) “仙姿定格” — final iconic pose, standing tall with one arm lifted, moon and Milky Way behind her, dress settling into a majestic finish.

Text and graphic details: Use the Chinese panel titles exactly as listed, plus short smaller Chinese descriptive lines under each title to mimic a storyboard annotation. Add white hand-drawn curved arrows and motion trails in several panels to show the choreography. Bottom title strip text should read {argument name="bottom title text" default="《嫦娥仙子·瑶池荷上舞》九宫格分镜图"}. Keep the typography elegant and legible, but the image should remain primarily visual.

Constraints: Use exactly 9 panels in a 3×3 arrangement, one goddess figure per panel, consistent costume and face across all panels, consistent moonlit Yaochi setting, no modern objects, no extra panels, no watermark, no logo.

zh.title: 嫦娥荷花舞分镜图
zh.description: 生成一张 3×3 的电影感中国神话分镜海报，描绘嫦娥在月光下的瑶池荷叶上翩翩起舞。
zh.prompt:
目标：创作一张名为 {argument name="poster title" default="《嫦娥仙子·瑶池荷上舞》九宫格分镜图"} 的中国古典神话电影感分镜海报，展示嫦娥在天界瑶池的巨型荷叶上表演优雅的连续古典舞。

画布：1:1 正方形海报，排布为标准的 3×3 网格，带有深色细分割线，如同电影导演的分镜接触印样。底部增加一条窄装饰标题栏，配有小型花纹装饰和居中的中文标题。每个分镜画面既要像独立的奇幻画作，又能连贯成完整的舞蹈序列。

视觉风格：超精细电影感中国神话奇幻风格，月光蓝银色调，浪漫空灵，轻雾缭绕，水面波光粼粼，明亮的满月，星空，远处的金色宫殿亭台与灯笼，天池中盛开的荷花与宽大的荷叶。采用写实数字绘画，展现细腻的丝绸质感、高细节度、柔和光晕以及飘逸织物带来的优雅动态模糊。

主体：{argument name="character name" default="嫦娥仙子"}，一位美丽的中国女神，留着黑色长发，佩戴华丽的银饰和玉饰，皮肤白皙透亮，神情宁静，身着层叠飘逸的 {argument name="dress color" default="白冰蓝相间"} 汉服舞衣，配有半透明纱袖和长飘带。她赤足或轻盈地伫立在倒映着水面的巨大荷叶上。

布局与分镜内容：包含 9 个带编号的分镜，每个分镜左上角有带圈数字，并配有白色/金色书法风格的中文舞台指示。9 个分镜分别为：1) “月下登场” — 嫦娥在月下登场，侧身站在巨型荷叶上，面纱在身后拖曳。2) “轻扬云袖” — 她双臂向外展开，扬起云袖，丝绸袖摆在空中飘浮。3) “俯身掬水” — 她俯身触碰或掬起池水，荷叶旁水珠飞溅，涟漪荡漾。4) “莲步轻移” — 她单臂伸展，在荷叶间轻盈迈步，裙摆和飘带低垂扫过。5) “旋转舒展” — 中心旋转姿态，裙摆和袖子呈圆形旋开，周围添加白色动态弧线。6) “轻跃回身” — 她轻跃回身，裙摆和飘带戏剧性地向一侧飞扬。7) “举臂望月” — 她单臂举向满月并抬头仰望，呈现出高傲优雅的剪影。8) “缓缓收势” — 她动作放缓并收势，在荷叶上优雅地坐下或缓缓落下，袖摆舒缓飘动。9) “仙姿定格” — 最终标志性姿态，单臂高举挺立，身后是月亮与银河，裙摆沉静，定格为庄重的终场。

文字与图形细节：使用列出的中文分镜标题，并在每个标题下方添加简短的中文描述行，以模仿分镜注释。在多个分镜中添加白色手绘曲线箭头和动态轨迹以展示编舞。底部标题栏文字应为 {argument name="bottom title text" default="《嫦娥仙子·瑶池荷上舞》九宫格分镜图"}。保持字体优雅且易读，但图像应以视觉呈现为主。

约束条件：使用 3×3 排布的 9 个分镜，每个分镜中仅包含一个女神形象，所有分镜中的服装和面容保持一致，统一的月光瑶池背景，无现代物品，无额外分镜，无水印，无 Logo。

en.title: Korean Cream Interior Portrait
en.description: A photorealistic vertical lifestyle portrait of a young East Asian woman posing in a soft cream minimalist indoor café or apartment setting.
en.prompt: Create a realistic 3:4 vertical Korean fresh indoor lifestyle portrait with a soft healing atmosphere and premium lifestyle magazine cover quality. The scene is a minimalist cream-toned interior with warm natural light, beige walls, pale stone tile floor, and shallow depth of field. Show exactly one adult East Asian woman, visually {argument name="character age" default="20 to 24 years old"}, positioned slightly left of center in a full-body composition, photographed at eye level from a subtly low angle. She has {argument name="hair style" default="long natural black hair, loose and softly parted"}, fair luminous skin, delicate makeup, small earrings, and a gentle smiling expression while looking at the camera. She wears {argument name="dress" default="a short white sleeveless chiffon dress with shoulder bow straps and a softly gathered waist"}, white ankle socks, and glossy black Mary Jane shoes. Pose her kneeling elegantly beside a gray marble counter: one knee on the floor, the other leg raised forward, left hand relaxed near the floor/counter edge, right arm extended toward the camera making a V peace sign, creating a friendly candid snapshot feeling. Include exactly five main background props: one open silver laptop on the marble counter at far left, one glass of iced coffee beside it, one warm table lamp glowing in the back left, one round wooden table at right, and one clear glass vase on the table holding a delicate bouquet of pink roses, cream roses, and tiny white filler flowers. Add one rounded cream boucle lounge chair behind the table. Use soft creamy whites, beige, warm wood, gray marble, realistic skin texture, natural fabric folds, glossy shoe reflections, subtle bokeh, no text, no watermark, no extra people, no camera distortion, and maintain photorealistic GPT Image 2 quality.

zh.title: 韩系奶油风室内人像
zh.description: 一张写实风格的竖版生活人像，展示了一位年轻东亚女性在柔和的奶油色极简主义室内咖啡馆或公寓中的姿态。
zh.prompt: 创作一张写实风格的 3:4 竖版韩系清新室内生活人像，营造治愈系氛围，达到高端生活杂志封面的质感。场景为极简主义奶油色调室内，拥有温暖的自然光、米色墙壁、浅色石材地砖及浅景深效果。画面中仅出现一名成年东亚女性，视觉年龄设定为 {argument name="character age" default="20 到 24 岁"}，构图采用全身照，位于画面中心偏左位置，以平视视角略带低角度拍摄。她拥有 {argument name="hair style" default="自然黑色长发，柔顺且自然中分"}，肤色白皙透亮，妆容精致，佩戴小巧耳环，面带温柔微笑看向镜头。她身穿 {argument name="dress" default="白色短款无袖雪纺连衣裙，肩部带有蝴蝶结系带，腰部有柔和的褶皱设计"}，搭配白色短袜和亮面黑色玛丽珍鞋。姿态设定为优雅地跪在大理石台面旁：一膝着地，另一条腿向前抬起，左手自然放松靠近地面或台面边缘，右手向镜头伸出比出 V 字剪刀手，营造出亲切自然的抓拍感。背景中包含五个主要道具：最左侧大理石台面上放着一台打开的银色笔记本电脑，旁边是一杯冰咖啡，左后方有一盏散发暖光的台灯，右侧有一张圆形木桌，桌上放着一个透明玻璃花瓶，插着由粉色玫瑰、奶油色玫瑰和细小白色填充花组成的精致花束。在桌子后方增加一把圆润的奶油色羊羔绒休闲椅。使用柔和的奶油白、米色、暖木色、灰色大理石色调，呈现真实的皮肤纹理、自然的织物褶皱、亮面鞋履的反射效果，背景虚化自然，无文字，无水印，无多余人物，无镜头畸变，并保持 GPT Image 2 的写实画质。

en.title: Blue Black Cat-Girl Chibi
en.description: Generates a soft anime chibi cat-girl illustration with blue accents, glasses, headphones, and a cozy pillow pose.
en.prompt: Create a square anime-style illustration of a cute chibi cat-girl with {argument name="hair color" default="long messy black hair with vivid cobalt-blue streaks and tips"}, sitting curled up with her knees drawn to her chest and leaning against a large soft blue pillow on the right side of the frame. She has oversized round black glasses, huge glossy blue eyes, a tiny neutral pout, pale skin, and black cat ears with bright blue inner fur. Her hair is voluminous and windswept, with one ahoge curl on top and many long strands flowing down the left side. She wears an oversized off-shoulder black sweater or hoodie, a black choker, black knee socks, and large black-and-blue headphones resting around her neck. The pose should feel shy, sleepy, and quietly adorable, with the character looking directly at the viewer. Use a clean white background with a faint light-blue grid pattern like notebook paper. Add exactly 4 simple decorative icons on the left/background area: 1 speech bubble near the upper left containing a small blue bird-like silhouette, 1 pair of small blue paw-print dots in the mid-left area, 1 large blue cat paw print in the lower left, and 1 cluster of tiny pale flower shapes on the pillow near the lower right. Use soft cel shading, delicate line art, glossy highlights, cool blue accents, and a polished modern moe illustration style. Keep the composition close-up, with the character filling most of the frame, no text, no watermark, and no extra characters.

zh.title: 蓝黑配色猫娘 Q 版
zh.description: 生成一张柔和的动漫风格 Q 版猫娘插画，带有蓝色点缀、眼镜、耳机以及舒适的抱枕姿势。
zh.prompt: 创作一张方形动漫风格插画，主角是一位可爱的 Q 版猫娘，拥有 {argument name="hair color" default="凌乱的长黑发，带有鲜艳的钴蓝色挑染和发梢"}。她蜷缩着身体，双膝抱胸，靠在画面右侧一个巨大的柔软蓝色抱枕上。她戴着超大号黑色圆框眼镜，有着巨大的亮蓝色双眸，嘴唇微嘟，肤色白皙，黑色的猫耳内侧是亮蓝色绒毛。她的头发蓬松且随风飘动，头顶有一根呆毛，多缕长发垂落在左侧。她穿着超大号露肩黑色毛衣或连帽衫，戴着黑色颈圈和黑色过膝袜，脖子上挂着一副大号黑蓝配色耳机。姿势应显得害羞、慵懒且安静可爱，角色直视镜头。背景使用干净的白色，带有淡淡的浅蓝色笔记本网格图案。在左侧/背景区域添加 4 个简单的装饰图标：左上方有一个包含小型蓝色鸟类剪影的对话气泡，左中部有一对蓝色小爪印，左下方有一个大型蓝色猫爪印，右下方抱枕上有一簇浅色小花。采用柔和的赛璐珞阴影、精致的线条、光泽高光、冷蓝色调以及精致的现代萌系插画风格。构图采用特写，角色填充大部分画面，无文字，无水印，无其他角色。

en.title: Romantic Time Guardian Couple
en.description: A vertical gothic fantasy illustration of a clockwork guardian embracing a jeweled muse before a radiant antique clock.
en.prompt: Create a dark romantic fantasy anime illustration titled {argument name="artwork title" default="Time Guardian"}: two characters, exactly 1 tall male guardian and exactly 1 delicate female muse, standing in an intimate embrace before a huge glowing antique clock face. The male character has {argument name="male hair color" default="messy black hair"}, pale skin, a sharp elegant face, dangling earrings, and a solemn protective expression as he bends his head toward the woman; he wears an ornate black gothic long coat with a high collar, layered armor-like shoulders, gold filigree, clockwork gears, chains, pendants, and mechanical timepiece ornaments. The female character has {argument name="female hair color" default="long wavy honey-blonde hair"}, soft pale skin, dreamy sorrowful eyes, and parted lips; she wears a translucent ivory-white flowing gown with a high thigh slit, sheer veils, gold chain drapery, starburst clock-hand jewelry, purple crystal drops, and delicate bracelets. His black-gloved arm crosses protectively in front of her chest while she lightly holds his sleeve, creating a bittersweet, tragic-love mood. Behind them is exactly 1 enormous circular stained-glass clock window with Roman numerals, radiant golden backlight, intricate concentric rings, visible gears, pendulums, astrolabe shapes, dangling chains, and warm dust motes. Use a vertical 2:3 composition, close full-body framing, lavish detail, cinematic golden hour glow, chiaroscuro shadows, amber and bronze highlights, ethereal fabric motion, ornate steampunk-gothic cathedral atmosphere, highly polished fantasy character art, ultra-detailed linework, soft painterly rendering, romantic melancholy. Add faint decorative watermark text reading {argument name="watermark text" default="♥ NaEun & Damien 2026"} repeated vertically along both side borders and subtly across the center, without overpowering the scene.

zh.title: 浪漫时光守护者情侣
zh.description: 一幅哥特式奇幻风格的竖构图插画，描绘了一位发条守护者在璀璨的古董钟前拥抱一位珠宝缪斯的场景。
zh.prompt: 创作一幅暗黑浪漫奇幻风格的动漫插画，标题为 {argument name="artwork title" default="时光守护者"}：画面包含两个角色，即 1 位高大的男性守护者和 1 位精致的女性缪斯，两人在巨大的发光古董钟面前深情相拥。男性角色拥有 {argument name="male hair color" default="凌乱的黑发"}、苍白的皮肤、轮廓分明且优雅的面容、佩戴吊坠耳环，他低头看向女性，神情庄重而充满保护欲；他身穿华丽的黑色哥特式长外套，配有高领、层叠的盔甲式肩部设计、金色花丝、发条齿轮、链条、挂饰以及机械钟表装饰。女性角色拥有 {argument name="female hair color" default="长波浪蜂蜜金发"}、柔软苍白的皮肤、梦幻般忧郁的双眼以及微张的双唇；她身穿半透明的象牙白飘逸长裙，裙摆有高开叉设计，搭配轻薄面纱、金链装饰、星芒状钟表指针珠宝、紫色水晶坠饰以及精致的手镯。他戴着黑色手套的手臂保护性地横在她的胸前，而她轻轻抓着他的衣袖，营造出一种苦涩而凄美的爱情氛围。他们身后是 1 扇巨大的圆形彩色玻璃钟面窗，带有罗马数字、璀璨的金色背光、复杂的同心圆环、可见的齿轮、摆钟、星盘形状、悬垂的链条以及温暖的尘埃微粒。采用 2:3 竖构图，近景全身构图，细节华丽，呈现电影般的黄金时刻光影、明暗对比强烈的阴影、琥珀色与青铜色的高光、飘逸的织物动态、华丽的蒸汽朋克哥特式大教堂氛围、高度精炼的奇幻角色艺术、超精细的线条、柔和的绘画质感以及浪漫的忧郁感。在两侧边缘垂直重复添加淡淡的装饰性水印文字 {argument name="watermark text" default="♥ NaEun & Damien 2026"}，并在画面中心进行微妙点缀，且不遮挡主体场景。

en.title: Short-Haired Woman With Glasses Street Portrait
en.description: A photorealistic golden-hour urban fashion portrait of a short-haired Japanese woman wearing glasses and an ivory dress.
en.prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical street portrait of {argument name="character name" default="Anri Okita"}, an adult Japanese woman with a sleek short dark-brown bob haircut, center part, fair skin, black rectangular eyeglasses, defined brows, subtle eye makeup, and vivid red lipstick. She is standing close to the camera on a city street at golden hour, looking directly into the lens with a calm confident expression. She wears a fitted ribbed ivory-white long-sleeve off-shoulder deep V-neck dress, a delicate gold necklace with a small pendant, dangling gold earrings, and a thin gold chain shoulder strap from a purse. Compose as an upper-body fashion portrait from slightly above chest level, shallow depth of field, natural realistic skin texture, soft warm sunset rim light, cinematic urban background with parked cars, asphalt road markings, modern buildings, and a storefront sign reading “VINO BAROLO” on the left. Use high detail, realistic proportions, natural color grading, crisp focus on the face and glasses, softly blurred background, no watermark, no extra text, no distorted hands, no cartoon or illustration style.

zh.title: 戴眼镜短发女性街头肖像
zh.description: 一张黄金时刻的写实城市时尚肖像，主角是一位戴着眼镜、身穿象牙色连衣裙的短发日本女性。
zh.prompt: 创作一张写实风格的竖版街头肖像，主角是 {argument name="character name" default="Anri Okita"}，一位成年日本女性，留着利落的深棕色短波波头，中分发型，皮肤白皙，佩戴黑色长方形眼镜，眉形清晰，画着精致的眼妆，涂着鲜艳的红唇。她站在城市街道上，靠近镜头，在黄金时刻的阳光下直视镜头，表情冷静自信。她身穿一件修身的象牙白长袖露肩深 V 领罗纹连衣裙，佩戴一条带有小吊坠的精致金项链、金质耳坠，肩上背着带有细金链条的包。构图为胸部以上位置的时尚肖像，采用浅景深，呈现自然的真实皮肤质感，柔和温暖的夕阳轮廓光，电影感的城市背景，包括停放的汽车、柏油路标线、现代建筑，左侧有一块写着“VINO BAROLO”的店招。要求高细节、比例真实、自然色彩分级，面部和眼镜焦点清晰，背景柔和虚化，无水印，无额外文字，无扭曲的手部，非卡通或插画风格。

en.title: Night Rooftop Fashion Portrait
en.description: A realistic full-body urban night portrait of a young woman on a rooftop, suitable for fashion or lifestyle photography generation.
en.prompt: Create a realistic full-body nighttime rooftop portrait of {argument name="character name" default="a young East Asian woman"} standing on a concrete apartment rooftop terrace with a city skyline in the background. She has {argument name="hair color and style" default="long straight black hair with soft bangs"}, fair skin, a slim build, and a calm slightly serious expression while looking directly at the camera. She wears {argument name="top" default="a fitted white sleeveless ribbed cropped tank top"}, {argument name="pants" default="high-waisted light blue straight-leg jeans"}, white low-top sneakers, and a delicate small pendant necklace. Pose her upright near a metal safety railing, one hand lightly resting on the rail and the other relaxed by her side, with one foot subtly forward.
